src: It has been confirmed that eight thoroughbred race horses at Randwick Racecourse in Sydney have been infected with equine influenza.
ref: Telah dikonfirmasi bahwa 8 kuda pacu thoroughbred di pacuan kuda Randwick di Sydney telah terinfeksi oleh flu kuda.

src: Randwick has been locked down, and is expected to remain so for up to two months.
ref: Randwick telah ditutup dan diperkirakan akan sampai dengan 2 bulan ke depan.

src: It is expected that the virulent flu will affect the majority of the 700 horses stabled at Randwick.
ref: Diperkirakan bahwa flu mematikan tersebut akan mempengaruhi sebagian besar dari 700 kuda yang dikandangkan di Randwick.

src: NSW Minister for Primary Industries said the facility would be quarantined until 30 days after the last sign of the flu.
ref: Menteri Industri Utama NSW berkata bahwa fasilitas akan dikarantina selama 30 hari setelah tanda akhir dari flu.

src: The cases are the first infections of race horses, despite infecting dozens of recreational horses across NSW and Queensland.
ref: Kasus ini adalah infeksi pertama pada kuda pacu, disamping menginfeksi lusinan kuda rekreasi di seluruh NSW dan Queensland.

src: The flu is highly contagious but cannot be transmitted to humans.
ref: Flu sangat mudah berjangkit namun tidak dapat menjangkiti manusia.

src: The national racing shutdown was costing the industry tens of millions of dollars every day.
ref: Penutupan balapan kuda nasional telah merugikan industri ini sekitar 10 juta dolar setiap hari.

src: Chief Executive of Racing NSW, Peter V'Landys said while racing had been disrupted since a ban on horse movements last weekend today was a "grim, black day" for the racing industry in NSW.
ref: Kepala Eksekutif Balapan Kuda Peter V'Landys NSW berkata ketika balapan kuda telah terganggu sejak larangan pergerakan kuda akhir pekan lalu, hari ini adalah "hari kelabu, suram" bagi industri balap kuda di NSW.

src: Racing is expected to resume in all Australian states except NSW and Queensland on the weekend.
ref: Balapan kuda diharapkan akan pulih di seluruh negara bagian Australia kecuali di NSW dan Queensland pada akhir pekan.

src: While Sydney's spring racing carnival has been canceled, Melbourne's is expected to kick off this weekend with the Caufield Cup.
ref: Ketika karnaval balapan kuda musim semi Sydney telah dibatalkan, balapan kuda Melbourne diharapkan dimulai akhir pekan ini dengan Piala Caufield.

src: The cup will be ran with special precautions in place to attempt to keep the state free of the virus.
ref: Kejuaraan akan diselenggarakan dengan kehati-hatian khusus di lokasi sebagai upaya untuk menjaga agar negara bagian bebas virus.

src: Contact between the general public and those working with the horses will be banned and Sydney-based jockeys Darren Beadman and Hugh Bowman and a number of interstate trainers including Bart Cummings are not allowed to take part.
ref: Kontak antara publik umum dan mereka yang bekerja dengan kuda-kuda akan dilarang dan Joki yang berbasis di Sydney Darren Beadman dan Hugh Bowman dan sejumlah pelatih antar negara bagian termasuk Bart Cummings dilarang ambil bagian.

src: Federal Minister for Agriculture, Peter McGauran said the spring carnival in Melbourne will remain "largely intact" despite losing some of the biggest names in Australian racing.
ref: Menteri Pertanian Federal Peter McGauran berkata karnaval musim semi di Melbourne akan tetap "utuh sebagian besar" meskipun kehilangan beberapa nama terbesar di dunia balapan kuda Australia.

src: At least 11 people were killed Dec. 26 and 27 in neighborhood gang turf fights between drug dealers at shantytown "morro da Mineira" (Miner Hill) in the Catumbi neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
ref: Paling sedikit 11 orang terbunuh pada tanggal 26 dan 27 Desember dalam perkelahian masal geng lingkungan antara pengedar narkotika di daerah kumuh "morro da Mineira" (Bukit Penambang) di lingkungan Catumbi, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

src: The region is controlled by rival gang Comando Vermelho (Red Command), which does not approve of other gangs selling drugs in the region.
ref: Wilayah ini di kuasai oleh geng saingan Comando Vrmelho (Komando Merah) yang tidak mengijinkan geng lain menjual narkotika di wilayah tersebut.

src: Comando Vermelho members started attacking the rival members of ADA to protect their turf.
ref: Anggota geng Comando Vermelho memulai penyerangan anggota ADA yang menjadi rival mereka untuk melindungi lahan mereka.

src: On Friday evening, an explosion in Chengdu, China caused partial shutdown of a facility operated by Foxconn, one of the world's biggest electronics manufacturers and a major supplier to companies like Hewlett-Packard, Dell, Sony, Apple, Motorola and Nokia.
ref: Pada hari Jum'at petang, sebuah ledakan di Chengdu, Cina mengakibatkan penutupan sebagian fasilitas yang dioperasikan oleh Foxconn, salah satu produsen elektronik terbesar di dunia dan pemasok utama perusahaan-perusahaan seperti Hewlett_Packard, Dell, Sony, Apple, Motorola dan Nokia.

src: Initial investigations now suggest the explosion was caused by poor ventilation, which lead to high concentrations of combustible dust.
ref: Investigasi awal menunjukkan bahwa ledakan disebabkan oleh ventilasi yang buruk yang menyebabkan tingginya konsentrasi debu yang dapat terbakar.

src: The blast happened at 7:18PM, around the time workers change shifts.
ref: Ledakan terjadi pada pukul 7:18 malam sekitar waktu pergantian giliran pekerja.

src: At least three people were killed, at least fifteen injured.
ref: Paling sedikit 3 orang tewas dan sedikitnya 15 orang terluka.

src: Foxconn halted production to investigate, saying "All operations at the affected workshop remain suspended and production at all other workshops that carry out similar processing functions have also been halted pending the results of the investigation. "
ref: Foxconn menghentikan kegiatan produksi untuk melakukan investigasi, mengatakan "Seluruh operasi di tempat produkasi yang terpengaruh masih ditangguhkan dan produksi di seluruh tempat produksi lain yang menjalankan fungsi proses yang mirip juga dihentikan sambil menunggu hasil investigasi."

src: "All other production operations in our facilities in China continue operating normally."
ref: "Seluruh operasi produksi lainnya di fasilitas kami di Cina melanjutkan operasi secara normal."

src: On Monday, city officials gave the cause as combustible dust in the air at a polishing workshop.
ref: Pada hari Senin, petugas kota memberitahukan penyebabnya adalah debu yang dapat terbakar di udara di bengkel penggosokan.

src: Hong Kong-based labor rights group Students & Scholars Against Corporate Misbehavior said they reported aluminium dust problems in March when they reviewed working conditions at Foxconn.
ref: Kelompok hak-hak pekerja Pelajar dan Sarjana Penentang Perilaku Buruk Perusahaan yang berbasis di Hongkong, mengatakan mereka telah melaporkan masalah debu aluminium pada bulan Maret ketika mereka mereview kondisi kerja di Foxconn.

src: After the explosion, they commented that workers were complaining "the ventilation of the department is poor. "
ref: Setelah ledakan tersebut, mereka berkomentar bahwa pekerja protes terhadap "ventilasi ruangan buruk."

src: "In the process, there is lots of aluminum (aluminium) dust floating in the air. "
ref: "Dalam proses, ada banyak debu aluminum (aluminium) mengambang di udara."

src: "Workers always breathe in aluminum dust even though they put on masks. "
ref: "Para pekerja selalu bernafas di dalam debu aluminium meskipun mereka menggunakan masker."

src: "When workers take off their cotton gloves, their hands are covered with aluminum dust."
ref: "Ketika pekerja membuka sarung tangan katun mereka, tangan mereka tertutupi oleh debu aluminium."

src: Foxconn responded by saying the group was trying to "capitalize on the tragic accident" and misrepresented "Foxconn's commitment to the health and safety of our employees."
ref: Foxconn merespon dengan mengatakan kelompok tersebut berupaya "mengkapitalisasi kecelakaan tragis" dan salah memahami "komitmen Focxonn terhadap kesehatan dan keselamatan pekerja kami."

src: Research group IHS iSuppli said the explosion may cause loss of production of 500,000 iPads during this quarter of the year.
ref: Kelompok penelitian IHS iSuppli mengatakan ledakan dapat mengakibatkan kerugian produksi sejumlah 500.000 iPad selama kuartal tahun ini.

src: They said there is a larger facility in Shenzhen , but it cannot cope with re-compensating the possible loss.
ref: Mereka mengatakan ada fasilitas yang lebih besar di Shenzen, namun tidak dapat memenuhi kompensasi kembali kerugian yang mungkin terjadi.

src: A magnitude 5.8 earthquake has struck in a place where earthquakes are rare, but sometimes large.
ref: Gempa berkekuatan 5,8 menghantam tempat yang jarang terjadi gempa, tetapi kadang-kadang terjadi yang besar.

src: According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), at 3:35 p.m (eastern time) the 5.8 quake struck in Antarctica, 105 kilometers (65 miles) south, southeast of Casey Station or 2565 kilometers (1590 miles) north of the South Pole.
ref: Menurut Survey Geologi Amerika (USGS), jam 3.35 pm (waktu bagian Timur) gempa berkekuatan 5,8 menghantam di Antartika, 105 kilometers (65 mil) selatan, sebelah selatan Stasiun Casey atau 2.565 kilometer (1/590 mil) utara kutub selatan.

src: The quake was reported at a depth of 7.5 k.m. (4.7 miles), but the USGS says it was "poorly constrained."
ref: Gempa dilaporkan di kedalaman 7,5 km. (4,7 mil), tetapi USGS mengatakan "dalam keadaan yang buruk."

src: Had any civilization existed on the frozen ice cap, the USGS says that damage could be "light to moderate."
ref: Apakah peradaban ada di tempat beku yang tertutup es, USGS mengatakan kerusakan bisa berupa "ringan sampai sedang."

src: Antarctica's biggest earthquake was a magnitude 8.1 which occurred on March 25, 1998 near the Balleny Islands of Antarctica.
ref: Gempa terbesar Antatika berkekuatan 8,1 yang terjadi pada 25 Maret 1998 dekat kepulauan Balleny Antartika.

src: Moldovan President Vladimir Voronin accused the Transnistrian authorities on Saturday of having supplied Russian weapons to Iraq during the regime of Saddam Hussein, Russian news agencies have said.
ref: Kantor berita Rusia mengatakan Presiden Moldova, Vladimir Voronin menuduh penguasa Transnistria pada hari Sabtu telah mensuplai senjata Rusia kepada Irak selama rezim Saddam Hussein.

src: Chisinau "holds official documents from the chancellery of Saddam Hussein, which show that Transnistria had supplied both arms, and entire weapon manufacturing lines to Iraq," Voronin told a group of Russian journalists, adding that an investigation on this case is under way.
ref: Pihak Chisinau "menahan dokumen resmi dari kekanseliran Saddam Hussein yang menunjukkan bahwa Transnistria telah mensuplai senjata ringan dan seluruh garis manufaktur persenjataan kepada Irak." Voronin mengatakan sekelompok wartawan Rusia menambahkan bahwa penyelidikan kasus ini sedang berjalan.

src: "Russia's control over this territory is obvious and we must call to account those who do not desire to solve this conflict", Voronin added.
ref: "Kontrol Rusia terhadap wilayah ini jelas dan kami harus memanggil untuk mempertanggungjawabkan siapa yang tidak ingin menyelesaikan konflik ini, " kata Voronin menambahkan.

src: Being asked what Russia must do to help solve the conflict, the Moldovan President said that it must take the munitions from that territory.
ref: Ketika ditanya apa yang harus dilakukan Rusia untuk membantu menyelesaikan konflik tersebut, presiden Moldova mengatakan peralatan militer harus ditarik dari wilayah itu.

src: "We consider this depot a political shield that supports the Transnistrian regime," the President emphasized.
ref: "Kami mempertimbangkan depo ini sebagai perisai politik yang mendukung rezim Transnitria, " Presiden menekankan.

src: Voronin added Moldova can prove Tiraspol sold weapons to Iraq.
ref: Voronin menambahkan Moldova dapat membuktikan Tiraspol telah menjual senjata kepada Irak.

src: "The document from Hussein's archive that can confirm this is being studied by the Moldovan authorities now," he said.
ref: Dia mengatakan "Dokumen dari arsip Hussein yang dapat memastikan ini sedang dipelajari oleh penguasa Moldova saat ini."

src: Voronin accused Moscow to settle this regional conflict, noting that Russian weapons are "a political coverage to protect the Transnistrian regime."
ref: Voronin menuduh Moskow menciptakan konflik regional, menyatakan bahwa senjata Rusia adalah "jaminan politik untuk melindungi rezim Transnistria."

src: The Moldovan leader noted that he has sent a package of documents to Russia regarding the activity of 13 Transnistrian military companies.
ref: Pemimpin Moldova mencatat bahwa dia telah mengirim paket dokumen kepada Rusia mengenai aktivitas 13 perusahaan militer Transnistri.

src: On the other hand, Moldovan Premier Vasile Tarlev accused Thursday the Russian troops in Transnistria of supplying weapons to the Chechen region, In reply, Russian Defence Minister Sergei Ivanov said that he "pledges his head" for Russian bases in Moldova, and assured that "no weapons from Transnistria had been sent."
ref: Di pihak lain, Perdana Menteri Moldova Vasile Tarlev menuduh hari Kamis tentara Rusia di Transnitria mensuplai senjata ke daerah Chechen, menanggapi hal ini Menteri Pertahanan Rusia Sergei Ivanov mengatakan bahwa dia "menjanjikan kepalanya" untuk pangkalan Rusia di Moldova, dan menjamin bahwa "tidak ada persenjataan dari Transnistria yang telah dikirim."

src: Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.
ref: Fabio Capello telah muncul sebagai favorit baru untuk menggantikan Steve McClaren sebagai pelatih kepala baru tim sepak bola Inggris setelah José Mourinho menarik dirinya sendiri dari mengambil pekerjaan tersebut.

src: The former Chelsea manager had been widely regarded as a favourite for the job but after he admitted yesterday that he is no longer interested in it, Capello became the new favourite.
ref: Mantan manajer Chelsea tersebut telah secara luas dianggap sebagai favorit untuk pekerjaan tersebut tetapi setelah ia mengakui kemarin bahwa ia tidak lagi tertarik pada itu, Capello menjadi favorit baru.

src: The Italian, who has previously managed Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus and Roma, would regard the England job as the highlight of his career according to sources close to him and is ready to open talks.
ref: Orang Italia, yang sebelumnya telah mengelola Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus dan Roma ini, akan memperhitungkan pekerjaan Inggris ini sebagai puncak dari karirnya menurut sumber yang dekat dengannya dan siap untuk membuka pembicaraan.

src: Other candidates for the job include fellow Italian Marcello Lippi, former Germany coach Jurgen Klinsmann and Aston Villa manager Martin O'Neill.
ref: Calon-calon lain untuk pekerjaan ini mencakup sesama orang Italia Marcello Lippi, mantan pelatih Jerman Jurgen Klinsmann dan manajer Aston Villa Martin O'Neill.

src: He said that $100 dollars per barrel was a "fair" price and remembered that when he assumed presidency of Venezuela in 1999, the price went up to about ten dollars.
ref: Dia mengatakan bahwa $100 dolar per barel adalah suatu harga yang "wajar" dan ingat bahwa ketika ia menjadi presiden Venezuela pada tahun 1999, harga tersebut naik menjadi sekitar 10 dolar.

src: The prices of raw oil approached $100 last week before settling down again.
ref: Harga minyak mentah mendekati $100 pekan lalu sebelum kembali stabil lagi.

src: Some observers think it is possible that the $100 barrier may be broken.
ref: Beberapa pengamat berpendapat bahwa mungkin saja batas $100 tersebut bisa dipecahkan.

src: During the trading session following this two-day summit, that is expected to result in the "Declaration of Riyadh", the price of petroleum rose $0.80 in the New York market and $0.66 in London.
ref: Selama sesi perdagangan yang mengikuti KTT 2 hari ini, yang diharapkan dapat menghasilkan "Deklarasi Riyadh", harga minyak naik $0,80 di pasar New York dan $ 0,66 di London.

src: The United Nations (UN) on Friday called on the government of Pakistan to investigate numerous killings and abductions, particularly of journalists.
ref: Pada hari Jumat Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa (PBB) mengunjungi pemerintah Pakistan untuk menyelidiki pembantaian dan penculikan, khususnya para wartawan.

src: "In the past eight days alone we have received reports on the killing of one journalist, Munir Shakir, in Balochistan on August 14 2011, and the disappearance of another journalist, Rehmatullah Daparkhel, three days earlier in North Waziristan on August 11," said spokesperson for the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights, Rupert Colville.
ref: "8 hari yang lalu kami menerima laporan mengenai pembunuhan salah satu wartawan, Munir Shakir, pada 14 Agustus 2011 di Balochistan, dan hilangnya wartawan lainnya, Rehmatullah Daparkhel, tiga hari pertama pada 11 Agustus di Waziristan Utara", ujar juru bicara Komisaris Tinggi Hak Asasi Manusia Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa, Rupert Colville.

src: According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, nine journalists have been killed in Pakistan this year, and at least 16 were killed in 2010.
ref: Menurut Komite Perlindungan Wartawan, sembilan wartawan dibunuh di Pakistan tahun ini, dan sedikitnya 16 terbunuh di 2010.

src: None of the killings had been investigated satisfactorily, Colville said.
ref: Tidak satupun dari yang terbunuh diselidiki sampai tuntas, ujar Colville.

src: Colville said that the UN would like to see the government review all of the incidents.
ref: Colville mengatakan bahwa PBB bermaksud melihat semua tinjauan ulang pemerintah terhadap semua peristiwa.

src: "We call on all responsible parties to immediately stop such violations of human rights, and we urge the government to take immediate steps to independently investigate these cases," he said.
ref: "Kami mengunjungi semua pihak penanggung jawab untuk berhenti segera atas pelanggaran hak asasi manusia, dan kami mendesak pemerintah untuk mengambil langkah segera untuk menyelidiki kasus-kasus ini dengan bebas", ujarnya.

src: Amnesty International has also urged the government of Pakistan to ensure the protection of journalists and media workers in the country.
ref: Amnesti Internasional juga mendesak pemerintah Pakistan untuk menjamin perlindungan para wartawan dan para pekerja media dalam negeri.

src: They have further called upon the Pakistani authorities to investigate attacks on journalists and to try those responsible in line with internationally recognised standards of human rights.
ref: Mereka menyerukan lebih lanjut kepada penguasa penduduk Pakistan untuk menyelidiki serangan terhadap para wartawan dan bertanggung jawab sejalan dengan standar pengetahuan internasional hak asasi manusia.

src: Colville said that the recent attacks on journalists were not uncommon in Pakistan and that many journalist groups regard the country as one of the most dangerous places to work.
ref: Colville mengatakan bahwa serangan belakangan ini pada para wartawan bukan hal yang asing di Pakistan dan banyak kelompok wartawan peduli terhadap negara sebagai salah satu tempat paling berbahaya untuk bekerja.

src: Shakir was shot dead after covering a protest organized by a Baloch separatist organization.
ref: Shakir ditembak mati setelah menghalangi unjukrasa yang diorganisir oleh sebuah organisasi separatis Baloch.

src: Irshad Matsoi, the bureau chief for the Online News Network where Shakir worked, said that the killing was linked to the journalist’s work.
ref: Irshad Matsoi, kepala biro untuk Network Jaring Berita Online tempat Shakir bekerja, mengatakan bahwa pembunuhan berhubungan dengan pekerjaan wartawan.

src: Journalism in Balochistan is becoming "an endangered profession," Matsoi said.
ref: Kegiatan wartawan di Balochistan adalah menjadi "sebuah profesi yang membahayakan", ujar Matsoi.

src: Reporters Without Borders (RWB) have appealed for punishment of those responsible for the murder.
ref: Wartawan Tanpa Batas (RWB) bermohon untuk hukuman yang bertanggung jawab atas pembunuhan tersebut.

src: According to RWB, journalists do not feel free to report in Balochistan, which has led to self-censorship in the region.
ref: Menurut RWB, para wartawan tidak merasakan kebebasan untuk melaporkan berita di Balochistan, hal ini mengarah ke pemeriksaan dalam wilayah sendiri.

src: The whereabouts of Daparkhel, kidnapped on August 11, is still unknown.
ref: Di sekitar Daparkhel, penculikan pada 11 Agustus, masih belum diketahui.

src: The worldwide press freedom organization said that the government must do everything they can to find him immediately.
ref: Organisasi kebebasan pers di seluruh dunia mengatakan bahwa pemerintah harus melakukan segala cara yang mereka mampu untuk menemukannya dengan segera.

src: "It is unacceptable that local journalists have to do the job of the police and investigate on their own using their contacts," the organization said.
ref: "Itu tak dapat diterima bahwa wartawan lokal harus melakukan pekerjaan polisi dan menyelidikinya dengan cara mereka dengan menggunakan jaringan mereka", ujar organisasi tersebut.

src: The Human Rights Commission of Pakistan (HRCP) has condemned the incidents.
ref: Komisi Hak Asasi Manusia Pakistan (HRCP) telah mengutuk peristiwa tersebut.

src: "There is a growing sense of insecurity among media persons who increasingly interpret each attack on journalists as a warning to ‘behave,’" the HRCP said last Monday.
ref: "Ada perasaan tidak aman yang tumbuh diantara orang-orang media keadaan tersebut semakin menjelaskan setiap serangan kepada para wartawan sebagai sebuah peringatan untuk 'bertindak'", ujar HRCP hari Senin lalu.

src: The HRCP also said that in almost all cases of violence against journalists in the last few years, those responsible have not been identified or punished.
ref: HRCP juga mengatakan bahwa sebagian besar kasus kekerasan terhadap para wartawan dalam beberapa tahun lalu, penanggung jawab tersebut belum diketahui atau dihukum.

src: "The HRCP calls upon the government to respond through effective action and not mere words in the next few days, sending a strong message to the mischief makers that it would no longer stand by as a mere spectator as journalists are killed and snatched," the Commission said.
ref: "HRCP menyerukan kepada pemerintah untuk menanggapi melalui aksi efektif dan bukan hanya omong kosong di beberapa hari berikutnya, mengirim pesan yang kuat untuk para pembuat kejahatan bahwa itu tidak lagi berdiri sebagai seorang penonton belaka seperti para wartawan terbunuh dan diculik", ujar komisi pengawas tersebut.

src: A 6.5 magnitude earthquake has hit the Indonesian island of Sulawesi, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
ref: 6,5 magnitude gempa bumi mengena pulau Sulawesi di Indonesia, menurut Penelitian Geologi AS.

src: The tremor, lasting about 2 minutes, sparked panic in numerous seaside communities on the island.
ref: Getaran, sekitar 2 menit lalu, kepanikan terjadi di banyak komunitas tepi laut di pulau.

src: According to officials, no injuries have been reported but sea water levels have risen up to four meters in areas.
ref: Menurut petugas tersebut, tidak ada yang luka-luka dilaporkan tetapi permukaan air laut meningkat empat meter di daerah tersebut.

src: Though precise details of the earthquake are still unclear, the US Geological Survey has said the tremor just after 0800 local time (0000 UTC) was 10km (6 mi) beneath the sea bed.
ref: Meskipun ketetapan perincian pada gempa bumi masih belum jelas, Penelitian Geologi AS mengatakan getaran setelah 08.00 waktu setempat (00.00 UTC) sekitar 10 km (6 mi) di bawah dasar laut.

src: Local meteorological officials have reported to the Associated Press news agency the earthquake had been 37km (23 mi) under the Sea of Flores.
ref: Petugas meteorologi setempat melaporkan kepada Asosiasi Pers agen berita bahwa gempa bumi terjadi 37 km (23 mi) di bawah Laut Flores.

src: Saddam Hussein pleaded "not guilty" at the opening of the al-Dujail trial on Wednesday.
ref: Saddam Hussein mengaku "tidak bersalah" di pembukaan sidang al-Dujail pada hari Rabu.

src: The court recessed for 6 weeks during which time his defense will be prepared.
ref: Pengadilan reses 6 minggu selama waktu pembelaannya akan disiapkan.

src: During the proceeding, Hussein argued that the judge was not appointed by him, and thus was not legitimate.
ref: Selama proses persidangan, Hussein berpendapat bahwa hakim tidak ditunjuk olehnya, sehingga tidak sah.

src: A tribunal of five Iraqi judges headed by Rizgar Mohammed Amin, with the death penalty vested in them, will decide his sentence.
ref: Sidang pengadilan 5 hakim Irak yang dipimpin oleh Rizgar Mohammed Amin, dengan hukuman mati diberikan kepada mereka, akan diputuskan hukumannya.

src: Recently Canadian MP Belinda Stronach had an affair with Tie Domi, a former NHL player.
ref: Akhir-akhir ini seorang Anggota Parlemen Kanada Belinda Stronach memiliki hubungan khusus dengan Tie Domi, seorang mantan atlet NHL.

src: She had refused to answer direct questions about her personal life.
ref: Dia telah menolak untuk menjawab secara langsung tentang kehidupan pribadinya.

src: Now for the first time since her affair, with Tie Domi, she sat down with CBC's George Stroumboulopoulos on his show The Hour to answer his questions about the affair, politics, and other topics during the nine minute chat, on October 9th.
ref: Sekarang untuk pertama kalinya sejak hubungan khususnya dengan Tie Domi diberitakan, dia duduk bersama George Stroumboulopoulos dari CBC pada acara The Hour untuk menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan seputar hubungan khususnya, politik, dan topik-topik lainnya dalam perbincangan selama sembilan menit, pada 9 Oktober.

src: No transcripts of this interview are officially available but, a video (see CBC source below) can be viewed.
ref: Salinan khusus seputar interview tersebut tidak dipublikasi secara resmi namun, sebuah video (lihat sumber CBC dibawah) dapat dilihat.

src: An act signed into law by Afghan President Hamid Karzai last month dramatically rolled back the rights of women in that country, according to human rights groups and a United Nations report on the bill by the United Nations Development Fund for Women.
ref: Tindakan menandatangani undang-undang oleh Presiden Afghanistan Hamid Karzai bulan lalu secara dramatis bergulir kembali hak asasi perempuan di negara itu, menurut kelompok hak asasi manusia dan laporan PBB pada laporan oleh Dana Pembangunan PBB untuk Perempuan.

src: The Afghan government has not provided a copy of the text of the Shia Family Law to the UN or to other outside groups requesting it, citing "technical problems", however, the UN and opposition politicians say that the bill contains numerous provisions restricting the rights of women, such as giving their husbands priority in court; requiring the husband's permission to leave the house, obtain education or employment, or to see a doctor; and reserving the custody of children to male relatives.
ref: Pemerintah Afghanistan belum memberikan salinan teks Undang-undang Keluarga Siah kepada PBB atau kelompok yang lain yang meminta salinan tersebut, namun "masalah teknis" yang disebutkan, PBB dan politikus oposisi mengatakan bahwa rancangan undang-undang mengadung banyak ketentuan yang membatasi hak wanita, seperti memberikan prioritas kepada suaminya di pengadilan; membutuhkan izin suami untuk meninggalkan rumah, mendapatkan pendidikan atau pekerjaan, atau untuk datang ke dokter; dan memesan penjaga terhadap anak-anak yang relatif laki-laki.

src: Three people were hospitalized with injuries after a series of explosions at Southwest Industrial Gases, Inc., a gas facility in Dallas, Texas.
ref: 3 orang diopname dengan luka-luka setelah sebuah rangkaian ledakan di Perusahan Industri Gas Southwest, sebuah fasilitas pemasok gas di Dallas, Texas.

src: Tanks of oxygen, helium and acetylene began to explode after a connector used to join acetylene tanks during the filling process malfunctioned.
ref: Tangki-tangki oksigen, helium dan asetilen mulai meledak setelah sebuah penghubung dulunya bergabung dengan tangki asetilen selama proses pengisian gagal berfungsi.

src: The explosions sent flaming debris into the air and onto buildings and expressways.
ref: Ledakan mengirim gejolak reruntuhan di udara dan ke gedung-gedung dan jalan-jalan kendaraan cepat.

src: Black smoke that could be seen for miles billowed from the facility.
ref: Asap hitam dapat terlihat menumpuk bergelombang bermil-mil dari tempat fasilitas.

src: The problem began around 9:30 a.m CDT (UTC-5) at a loading dock, according to Dallas Fire Department Lt. Joel Lavender, and then spread to a trailer housing some 100,000 cubic feet (approximately 28,300 cubic metres) of gas.
ref: Masalah mulai sekitar pukul 9.30 pagi CDT (UCT-5) pada sebuah muatan galangan kapal, menurut Departemen Pemadam Kebakaran Dallas Lt. Joel Lavender, dan kemudian menyebar ke beberapa perumahan gandengan 100.000 kubik (kira-kira 28.300 meter persegi) gas.

src: Authorities evacuated an area that was one-half of a mile (approximately 800 m) wide.
ref: Pihak berwenang mengungksian di sebuah area luasnya 1 setengah mil (kira-kira 800 m).

src: Portions of Interstate 35 and Interstate 30 were shut down.
ref: Sebagian dari Jalan antar negara bagian 35 dan Jalan antar negara bagian 30 telah ditutup.

src: Flaming debris ignited small grass fires next to the roads.
ref: Gejolak reruntuhan menyalakan kebakaran kontainer kecil hampir ke jalanan.

src: Tanks were reported to have landed as far away as four blocks.
ref: Tangki-tangki dilaporkan mendarat sejauh 4 blok.

src: Officials for the Environmental Protection Agency, as well as local and state environmental officials, have deemed air quality levels acceptable following the blast.
ref: Pejabat-pejabat untuk Agen Perlidungan Lingkungan, maupun dinas lingkungan negara dan setempat, menganggap kualitas udara dapat diterima mengikuti ledakan.

src: Hazardous material crews have blocked water used in the fire from entering the Dallas storm drains.
ref: Pegawai menghambat Zat berbahaya ke air yang digunakan untuk memadamkan kebakaran dari memasuki badai yang terus-menerus di Dallas.

src: "I just advised my teams to get out," said Eddy Parker of Airgas which operates right next to Southwest Industrial.
ref: "Saya menasehatkan tim-tim saya untuk keluar", ujar Eddy Parker pada Airgas yang beroperasi sebelah kanan dekat Industri Southwest.

src: "Then we turned and ran and just kept hearing explosions."
ref: "Kemudian kami berbelok dan berlari dan hanya mendengar ledakan."

src: "Given the fact that there haven’t been any fatalities, it seems like our fire department and emergency responders did a great job."
ref: "Setuju dengan fakta tersebut bahwa belum pernah ada kematian dalam kecelakaan, tampaknya seperti departemen pemadam kebakaran kami dan penanggungjawab keadaan darurat melakukan pekerjaan hebat."

src: "But we need to let the fire department look at why this is occurring there in that area," said City Councilman Steve Salazar.
ref: "Tetapi kami harus membiarkan departemen pemadam kebakaran memeriksanya mengapa ini terjadi di area sana", ujar Penasehat Kota Steve Salazar.

src: Two of the injured men, Randal Bibb, 52, and Daniel McMurry, 56, were taken to Parkland Memorial Hospital to be treated for upper-body burns.
ref: 2 laki-laki terluka, Randal Bibb, 52, dan Daniel McMurry, 56, dibawa ke Rumah Sakit Parkland Memorial untuk dirawat atas luka bakar tubuh atas.

src: The third, an unidentified truck-driver, was treated and released at Methodist Dallas Medical Center.
ref: Ketiga, seorang supir truk yang tak dikenal, dirawat dan dibebaskan dari Methodist Dallas Medical Center.

src: He hurt his back when he jumped from the cab of his truck.
ref: Dia melukai punggungnya disaat melompat dari truknya.

src: The 12-year-old son of neuroscientist and MIT graduate Dr. Aafia Siddiqui, Mohammad Ahmed, was handed over to his aunt Fauzia Siddiqui in Islamabad after years of detention in a US military base in Afghanistan.
ref: 12 tahun anak lelaki ilmuan sistem saraf dan lulusan MIT Dr. Aafia Siddiqui, Mohammad Ahmed, menyerahkan kepada bibinya Fauzia Siddiqui di Islamabad setelah setahun penahanan di militer AS yang berada di Afghanistan.

src: Dr. Aafia Siddiqui is still currently facing trial charged with attempting to kill American soldiers in Afghanistan.
ref: Dr. Aafi Siddiqui masih menghadapi beban peradilan sekarang ini dengan percobaan pembunuhan tentara-tentara Amerika di Afghanistan.

src: Siddiqui and her three children disappeared after leaving her parent's house in Karachi on 30th March, 2003.
ref: Siddiqui dan 3 anaknya menghilang setelah meninggalkan rumah orang tuanya di Karachi pada 30 Maret 2003.

src: She was married to a nephew of Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, the accused mastermind of the September 11 attacks.
ref: Dia menikah dengan seorang kemanakan Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, dia tertuduh mendalangi serangan 11 September.

src: Her husband was captured in 2003 and is now held at the Guantanamo Bay Detention Center.
ref: Suaminya di tahan di 2003 dan sekarang diadakan di Pusat Penahanan Selat Guantanamo.

src: In 2004, Dr. Aafia was identified by the FBI as an "Al-Qaeda operative and facilitator who posed a clear and present danger to America".
ref: Di 2004, Dr. Aafia dikenali oleh FBI sebagai seorang "mata-mata Al-Qaeda dan ekspeditur yang bersikap jelas dan yang berbahaya untuk Amerika saat ini."

src: Mohammad Ahmed was only six when he and his mother, brother and sister were abducted from Karachi in 2003 and later handed over to US authorities.
ref: Mohammad Ahmad hanya berumur 6 pada saat dia dan ibunya, saudara lelaki dan saudara perempuan diculik dari Karachi tahun 2003 dan kemudian diserahkan ke pihak berwenang AS.

src: Dr. Fauzia told journalists after the boy had been given to her by officials of the interior ministry and intelligence agencies.
ref: Dr. Fauzia berkata kepada para wartawan setelah anak lelaki diberikan kepadanya secara resmi oleh menteri dalam negeri dan agen-agen rahasia.

src: Mohammad Ahmed arrived at the Benazir International Airport in Islamabad from Kabul in a PIA flight and was taken to his aunt’s residence.
ref: Mohammad Ahmed tiba di Bandara Internasional Benazir di Islamabad dari Kabul di sebuah penerbangan PIA dan diambil kediaman bibinya.

src: Human Rights Commission of Pakistan co-chairman Iqbal Haider said that the daughter of Dr. Aafia was also in Afghanistan.
ref: Komisi Hak Asasi Manusia Ketua Pakistan Iqbal Haider mengatakan puteri Dr. Aafia juga di Afghanistan.

src: He regretted that despite having U.S. nationality, the U.S. government did nothing for the release of its four citizens, stating that "this is [a] severe violation of the US laws and constitution."
ref: Dia menyesali bahwa walaupun dia mempunyai kebangsaan A. S., pemerintah A. S. tidak melakukan pembebasan atas 4 warga negara, menyatakan bahwa "ini [sebuah] kekerasan yang kejam konstitusi dan hukum-hukum AS."

src: Muhammad Ahmed landed back to his home in Karachi from where he had disappeared five years back, with his family.
ref: Muhammad Ahmed mendarat kembali ke rumahnya di Karachi dari tempat dia menghilang 5 tahun sebelumnya, dengan keluarganya.

src: Dr. Fauzia and her family are hoping that the other two missing children would also be back home soon, by taking some positive steps from the Government of Pakistan.
ref: Dr. Fauzia dan keluarganya mengharapkan 2 anak lainnya yang hilang juga dapat pulang segera, dengan mengambil beberapa langkah positif dari Pemerintah Pakistan.

src: Two Palestinian families who have been living in East Jerusalem since 1956, were evicted from their homes on Sunday after an Israeli court rejected their appeal filed against the eviction.
ref: 2 keluarga Palestina yang tinggal di Jerusalem Timur sejak 1956, diusir dari rumah mereka pada hari Minggu setelah sebuah pengadilan Israel menolak permohonan mereka melawan pengusiran.

src: The eviction comes after increasing international pressure on Israel to stop settlement activity and end home evictions.
ref: Pengusiran diikuti meningkatnya tekanan internasional Israel untuk menghentikan penyelesaian kegiatan dan pengusiran rumah berakhir.

src: Israeli security forces entered the homes at 6:00 a.m. (local time) and forcibly removed the family and international activists who were also living in the homes.
ref: Pasukan keamanan Israel memasuki rumah-rumah pada pukul 6:00 pagi (waktu setempat) dan keluarga dikeluarkan secara paksa dan para aktifis internasional juga tinggal di rumah-rumah tersebut.

src: Al Jazeera reports that a family was beaten with batons as they tried to get back into their house.
ref: Al Jazeera melaporkan bahwa sebuah keluarga dipukul dengan tongkat ketika mereka berusaha kembali ke dalam rumah mereka.

src: JTA reports that Jewish families moved into the homes shortly after the Palestinian families were evicted.
ref: JTA melaporkan para keluarga kaum Yahudi dipindahkan ke dalam rumah-rumah tidak lama sesudah para keluarga kaum Palestina diusir.

src: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has laid biblical claim to the areas of East Jerusalem and has stated that Jews have the right to live anywhere in the city.
ref: Perdana Menteri Israel Benjamin Netanyahu meletakkan injil mengakui area-area Jerusalem Timur dan menyatakan kaum Yahudi punya hak untuk tinggal dimanapun di kota tersebut.

src: Although Jerusalem is internationally recognized as occupied territory, Israel continues to evict Palestinians and instead build Jewish only apartments in the area, an action which is considered to be illegal under the Fourth Geneva Convention.
ref: Walaupun Jerusalem dikenali secara internasional sebagai wilayah yang diduduki, Israel melanjutkan mengusir rakyat Palestina dan sebagai ganti membangun apartemen hanya untuk kaum Yahudi di area tersebut, sebuah aksi yang dipertimbangkan tidak sah di bawah Konvensi Ke-4 Jenewa.

src: Israel has plans for 350 new apartment buildings in East Jerusalem.
ref: Israel merencanakan untuk 350 bangunan apartemen baru di Jerusalem Timur.

src: U.N special coordinator for Middle East Peace, Robert Serry, condemned the evictions as "totally unacceptable".
ref: UN koordinator khusus untuk Perdamaian Timur Tengah, Robert Serry, mengutuk pengusiran tersebut "sama sekali tidak dapat diterima."

src: The international community, including the United States, has called on Israel to stop settlement activity and allow for the creation of a Palestinian state.
ref: Komunitas Internasional, temasuk Amerika Serikat, menghubungi Israel untuk menghentikan kegiatan perkampungan dan mengizinkan untuk menciptakan negara Palestina.

src: A fifth child has died as a result of a police pursuit that ended in a crash in Dinuba, California on Sunday, August 9.
ref: Anak kelima telah meninggal akibat dari pengejaran polisi yang mengakibatkan kecelakaan di Dinuba, California pada hari Minggu 9 Agustus.

src: Carlos Eric Salazar, aged 8, was the eighth victim to die as a result of the crash.
ref: Carlos Eric Salazar, berusia 8 tahun adalah korban ke delapan yang meninggal dunia karena kecelakaan tersebut.

src: On Sunday, four children were among seven that were killed when the pursued suspect who, after refusing to stop for police, slammed into the GMC Sierra pickup truck carrying a family, two adults and five children.
ref: Pada hari Minggu, empat dari tujuh anak yang tewas dalam pengejaran tersangka yang menolak untuk berhenti dari polisi menabrak GMC truk pick up Sierra yang membawa sebuah keluarga, dua dewasa dan lima anak-anak.

src: The family was on their way to attend a football game for youths when the crash occurred.
ref: Keluarga tersebut dalam perjalanan menghadiri pertandingan sepak bola untuk anak muda saat kejadian tersebut berlangsung.

src: Four of the children were ejected from the truck and died at the scene.
ref: Empat dari anak tersebut terlempar dari truk dan tewas di tempat kejadian.

src: The two adults and one child were taken to Community Regional Medical Center located in Fresno.
ref: Dua orang dewasa dan satu anak kecil dilarikan ke pusat medis komunitas regional yang berada di Fresno.

src: Both vehicles collided with lemon trees at an orchard near the intersection of Avenue 424 and Road 120 in Dinuba.
ref: Kedua kendaraan bertabrakan dengan pohon jeruk di kebun dekat persimpangan Avenue 424 dan jalan 120 di Dinuba.

src: Three people, including the suspect, were in a stolen 2005 Dodge Neon and also died at the scene.
ref: Tiga orang temasuk tersangka ada didalam mobil curian Dodge Neon tahun 2005 dan juga tewas dalam tempat kejadian.

src: Their identities are not yet known as none of them were carrying identification.
ref: Identitas mereka belum diketahui karena tidak seorangpun dari mereka membawa identitas.

src: The other children were named Sienna Salazar aged 1, Michael aged 3, Monique aged 4 and Jocelyn aged 7.
ref: Anak lainnya bernama Sienna Salazar berusia 1 tahun, Michael berusia 3 tahun, Monique berusia 4 tahun dan Jocelyn berusia 7 tahun.

src: The two adults, Carlos Salazar Jr., 29, and Jennifer, 26, remain in the hospital where they are recovering from their injuries.
ref: Kedua orang dewasa, Carlos Salazar Jr, 29 tahun, dan Jennifer, 26 tahun, tetap berada di rumah sakit di mana mereka dalam masa pemulihan dari luka mereka.

src: None of the victims in the pickup were wearing seat belts, according to Fox News.
ref: Tak satupun dari korban di dalam pick up menggunakan sabuk pengaman menurut berita Fox.

src: The official results of the 2007 Ontario General Election now show that the Ontario Liberal Party has been re-elected.
ref: Hasil resmi Pemilihan Umum Ontario tahun 2007 menunjukkan bahwa Partai Liberal Ontario kembali terpilih.

src: The Liberal Party lead by Dalton McGuinty will spend the next four years in a majority government.
ref: Partai Liberal yang dipimpin oleh Dalton McGuinty akan menghabiskan empat tahun kedepan di pemerintah mayoritas.

src: McGuinty is the first Liberal premier to have back-to-back majorities since Mitchell Hepburn, who held office from 1934-1942, with his second majority starting in 1937.
ref: McGuinty adalah pemimpin Partai Liberal pertama yang dua kali berturut-turut terpilih menjadi pemerintah mayoritas sejak Mitchell Hepburn, yang memimpin kantor dari tahun 1934-1942, dengan masa jabatan kedua yang dimulai pada tahun 1937.

src: Hepburn's government legacy includes the Queen Elizabeth Way and Rainbow Bridge to Niagara Falls, New York.
ref: Warisan pemerintahan Hepburn termasuk Queen Elizabeth Way dan Rainbow Bridge sampai ke Air Terjun Niagara, New York.

src: Pope Shenouda III of Alexandria, the leader of Egypt's Coptic Christian church, has died at the age of 88.
ref: Paus Shenouda III dari Alexandria, pemimpin gereja Kristen Koptik Mesir, meninggal dunia di usia 88 tahun.

src: His funeral was held at a packed in Cairo today.
ref: Pemakamannya dilaksanakan di sebuah acara di Mesir hari ini.

src: The mass featured hymns, prayers and incense-burning as crowds in and outside the cathedral paid their respects.
ref: Misa pemakaman tersebut berisi lagu-lagu pujian, doa-doa dan pembakaran dupa saat kerumunan jemaat di dalam dan di luar katedral melakukan penghormatan mereka.

src: A large police presence watched over the scenes as mourners wept.
ref: Kehadiran polisi dalam jumlah besar mengawali upacara tersebut sebagai orang-orang yang berkabung.

src: Field Marshal , presently leader of Egypt, has made today a day of mourning.
ref: Field Marshal, yang saat ini menjadi pemimpin Mesir, menyatakan hari ini sebagai hari berkabung.

src: The Coptic Church is among the world's oldest and traces its roots to St Mark in the first century.
ref: Gereja Koptik termasuk diantara yang tertua di dunia dan melacak jejak akarnya ke St Mark pada abad pertama.

src: Shenouda spent 40 years as pope to the Coptics, who make up the majority of the nation's estimated ten million Christians.
ref: Shenouda menghabiskan 40 tahun sebagai paus untuk Gereja-Gereja Koptik, yang membentuk mayoritas umat Kristen negara tersebut yang diperkiran mencapai sepuluh juta umat.

src: Much of this time was spent pacifying his followers in the wake of violence and perceived discrimination, whilst working with the majority Muslims.
ref: Sebagian besar waktunya dihabiskan untuk mendamaikan pengikutnya ditengah kekerasan dan diskriminasi yang dirasakan, selama bekerja sama dengan mayoritas umat Muslim.

src: He spent three years exiled in the cathedral after claims of sectarian troublemaking from then-President in 1981.
ref: Dia menghabiskan tiga tahun pengasingan di katedral setelah mengklaim pembuat kerusuhan sektarian sejak saat Presiden pada tahun 1981.

src: With Mubarak gone, many Copts are concerned that Islamist political parties gaining new influence could mark a time of trouble for their religion.
ref: Dengan hilangnya Mubarak, banyak Gereja Koptik khawatir bahwa partai-partai politik Islam akan mendapatkan pengaruh yang baru yang dapat dipandang sebuah masa sulit untuk agama mereka.

src: "He left us an example of leadership that we should all follow," a cleric told the congregation at the fourth-century cathedral.
ref: "Dia meninggalkan kita contoh kepemimpinan yang kita semua harus mengikuti, " kata pendeta pada jemaat di katedral abad keempat.

src: "It is because of him that we have national unity with our Muslim brothers".
ref: "Ini karena usahanya bahwa kita memiliki rasa persatuan nasional dengan saudara Muslim kita."

src: Traffic was congested around the cathedral, which the pope remained fond of, while services were ongoing today.
ref: Lalu lintas sangat padat di sekitar katedral, dimana paus tersebut tetap dipuja, sementara kebaktian dilaksanakan hari ini.

src: Shenouda was dressed in full regalia, complete with a gold crown.
ref: Shenouda mengenakan pakaian regalia komplit, dilengkapi dengan sebuah mahkota emas.

src: His body was taken to a military airfield and was to be taken to desert monastery St Bishoy for burial.
ref: Jenazahnya dibawa ke sebuah lapangan udara militer dan akan dibawa ke biara gurun St Bishoy untuk dikremasi.

src: Tributes have been paid to Pope Shenouda as thousands of people mourned his death.
ref: Penghormatan diberikan kepada Paus Shenouda saat ribuan orang berkabung dalam kematiannya.

src: President of the United States Barack Obama said in a statement "We will remember Pope Shenouda III as a man of deep faith, a leader of a great faith, and an advocate for unity and reconciliation…"
ref: Presiden Amerika Serikat Barack Obama berkata dalam sebuah pernyataan resemi, "Kami akan mengingat Paus Shenouda III sebagai seorang dengan iman yang sangat dalam, seorang pemimpin yang beriman, dan seorang pendorong adanya kesatuan dan rekonsiliasi. ."

src: "His commitment to Egypt's national unity is also a testament to what can be accomplished when people of all religions and creeds work together."
ref: "Komitmennya untuk persatuan nasional Mesir juga sebuah bukti apa yang dapat dicapai ketika orang dari semua agama dan kepercayaan bekerja sama."

src: According to BBC News Online more than 300 people were detained and at least 10 hurt after a second night of riots in Estonia's capital, Tallinn.
ref: Menurut berita online BBC lebih dari 300 orang tertahan dan setidaknya 10 orang terluka setelah malam kedua kerusuhan di ibukota Estonia, Tallinn.

src: Clashes began last night after Estonian authorities removed a controversial Soviet monument, the Bronze Soldier of Tallinn, which Russian-speaking Estonians see as a symbol of the liberation of Eastern Europe from Nazism, while Estonian nationalists view it as a reminder of Soviet occupation.
ref: Pertikaian terjadi semalam setelah pihak otoritas Estonia mencopot sebuah monumen kontroversial, the Bronze Soldier of Tallinn, yang dipandang oleh warga Estonia yang berbahasa Rusia sebagai sebuah simbol dari kebebasan Eropa Timur dari Rezim Nazi, sementara para nasionalis Estonia memandang monumen tersebut sebagai sebuah peringatan masa pendudukan Uni Soviet.

src: A wax model of British singer Amy Winehouse was unveiled on Wednesday at Madame Tussauds in London.
ref: Model lilin penyanyi Inggris Amy Winehouse diluncurkan pada hari Rabu di Madame Tussauds di London.

src: The model, nearly six feet tall and clad in a yellow dress with a microphone in hand, is said to bear a strong likeness to the singer.
ref: Model tersebut, yang hampir enam kaki tingginya dan dibalut dengan gaun kuning dengan sebuah mikrofon di tangannya, disebutkan sangat mirip dengan sang penyanyi.

src: Her tattoos have even been reproduced to the last detail, including one of a lightning bolt.
ref: Tatonya bahkan juga dibuat dengan sangat detil, termasuk salah satu yang berbentuk petir.

src: While her parents attended the event, Winehouse herself was too busy working to attend.
ref: Sementara orang tuanya menghadiri acara tersebut, Winehouse sendiri sangat sibuk sehingga tidak dapat hadir.

src: Her father Mitch remarked that "This is the reward for her musical achievements and her talent".
ref: Ayahnya Mitch mengatakan bahwa "Ini adalah penghargaan untuk semua pencapaian dan talentanya di dunia musik."

src: The troubled singer, 24, is well known for her drug use, and last month was thought to have been suffering from the early stages of emphysema.
ref: Penyanyi kontroversial tersebut, yang berusia 24 tahun, dikenal dengan ketergantungannya dengan obat-obatan terlarang, dan bulan lalu diperkirakan terserang penyakit emfisema tahap awal.

src: Pope Benedict XVI has announced that he will be coming to the United Kingdom in January 2010.
ref: Paus Benediktus XVI telah mengumumkan bahwa dia akan pergi ke Inggris pada bulan Januari tahun 2010.

src: The information was announced that the Pope had accepted an invitation to visit the United Kingdom from Prime Minister Gordon Brown.
ref: Informasi tersebut diumumkan bahwa Paus telah menerima undangan untuk berkunjung ke Inggris dari Perdana Menteri Gordon Brown.

src: The latter had visited the Vatican City three times and had invited the Pope to come to Great Britain in February 2009.
ref: Yang terakhir telah mengunjugi kota Vatikan tiga kali dan telah mengundang Paus untuk datang ke Inggris pada bulan Februari tahun 2009.

src: Downing Street is expected to confirm the arrangements later today.
ref: Downing Street diharapkan mengkonfirmasi pengaturan hari ini.

src: This visit would make the first Papal visit to the UK since Pope John Paul II's visit in 1982.
ref: Kunjungan ini akan menjadikan kunjungan Paus yang pertama ke Inggris sejak kunjungan Paus Yohanes Paulus II pada tahun 1982.

src: However, John Paul's visit was on a pastoral basis, so this is set to be the first state visit to the UK by a pope in that it is the first to follow an official invitation.
ref: Meskipun demikian, kunjungan Paus Yohanes Paulus adalah dalam rangka kunjungan pastoral, jadi ini akan menjadi kunjungan kenegaraan pertama ke Inggris oleh seorang Paus bahwa ini adalah yang pertama kali menindaklanjuti undangan resmi.

src: John Paul's six-day tour through England, Scotland and Wales was hugely popular, attracting hundreds of thousands of people from the Catholic religion.
ref: Kunjungan enam hari Paus Yohanes Paulus di Inggris, Skotlandia, dan Wales sangat terkenal, menarik ratusan dari ribuan orang yang beragama Katolik.

src: It became the first ever UK visit from the Pope, which will make Pope Benedict's visit the second papal one.
ref: Ini menjadi kunjungan Paus yang pertama, yang akan membuat kunjungan Paus Benediktus ini yang kedua setelah kunjungan Paus yang pertama dulu.

src: John Paul's visit was likely to be cancelled due to the Falklands War and assasination attempts.
ref: Kunjungan Paus Yohanes Paulus tampaknya akan dibatalkan karena Perang Falklands dan usaha-usaha pembunuhan.

src: American author and producer Michael Crichton has died in Los Angeles, California at the age of 66, according to a statement released by his family.
ref: Penulis dan produser asal Amerika Michael Crichton meninggal di Los Angeles, California pada usia 66 tahun, menurut sebuah rilis resmi dari keluarganya.

src: According to Entertainment Tonight, Crichton died after a long and quiet battle with cancer.
ref: Menurut Entertainment Tonight, Crichton meninggal dunia setelah peperangan panjangnya melawan kanker.

src: While the world knew him as a great storyteller that challenged our preconceived notions about the world around us — and entertained us all while doing so — his wife Sherri, daughter Taylor, family and friends knew Michael Crichton as a devoted husband, loving father and generous friend who inspired each of us to strive to see the wonders of our world through new eyes, said a statement by his family.
ref: Saat dunia mengenalnya sebagai seorang penulis cerita yang luar biasa yang menantang praduga kita tentang dunia di sekitar kita - dan menghibur kita semua saat melakukan hal itu - istrinya Sherri, anak perempuannya Taylor, keluarga dan teman-temannya mengenal Michael Crichton sebagai seorang suami yang berbakti, ayah yang penuh kasih dan teman yang murah hati yang menginspirasi setiap kita untuk berjuang melihat keindahan dunia kita melalui sudut pandang yang baru, kata salah seorang anggota kelaurganya.

src: Crichton, who was born in Chicago, Illinois in 1942, was most famous for the writing of his Jurassic Park novels.
ref: Crichton, yang lahir di Chicago, Illinois pada tahun 1942, paling dikenal karena menulis novel-novel Jurassic Park.

src: He also published The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline, Eaters of the Dead, all of which became major motion pictures.
ref: Dia juga menerbitkan The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline, Eaters of the Dead, yang semuanya itu menjadi film utama.

src: He also created, and was an active executive producer of the hit television show ER.
ref: Dia juga menciptakan, dan juga sempat menjadi seorang eksekutif produser aktif untuk acara televisi ternama ER.

src: On Wednesday North Korea's official media dropped Kim Jong Il's honourific title "Dear leader", reported Japan's Radiopress.
ref: Pada hari Rabu media resmi Korea Utara menurunkan gelar honorific Kim Jong Il "Pemimpin Tercinta", dilaporkan Radiopress Jepang.

src: It was only days after the Russian news agency Itar-Tass reported that portraits of Kim Jong Il have recently been removed from public display in North Korea.
ref: Hanya satu hari setelah kantor berita Rusia Itar Tass melaporkan bahwa potret Kim Jong Il dipindahkan dari pandangan publik di Korea Utara.

src: According to Radiopress, a Japanese news agency that monitors North Korea's radio broadcasts, the North's Korean Central Broadcasting Station, as well as the Korean Central News Agency and other North Korean media, have stopped using the term "Dear leader" when referring to Kim Jong Il, the country's supreme leader.
ref: Menurut Radiopress, sebuah agen berita Jepang yang memonitor siaran radio Korea Utara, North's Korean Central Broadcasting Station, dan juga Korean Central News Agency dan media Korea Utara yang lain, telah menghentikan istilah "Pemimpin tercinta" ketika mengacu pada Kim Jong Il, pemimpin besar negara tersebut.

src: Now the media in North Korea only use the official titles "General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea", " the Chairman of the DPRK National Defense Commission" and/or "Supreme Commander of the Korean People's Army" when referring to Kim.
ref: Sekarang media di Korea Utara hanya menggunakan judul resmi "Sekretaris Jenderal Partai Buruh Korea", "Ketua Komisi Pertahanan Nasional DPRK" dan/atau "Panglima Tertinggi Tentara Rakyat Korea" ketika mengacu pada Kim.

src: Earlier Itar-Tass also reported that according to an unnamed foreign diplomat in Pyongyang, Kim Jong Il's portraits have recently been taken down from public display secretly and without explanation.
ref: Awalnya Itar Tass juga melaporkan bahwa menurut dipolomat asing tak bernama di Pyongyang, potret Kim Jong Il telah diturunkan dari pandangan publik secara rahasia dan tanpa penjelasan.

src: However, the portraits of Kim's father, Kim Il Sung, still remain, according to the same report.
ref: Namun, potret dari ayah Kim, Kim Il Sung, masih tersisa, menurut laporan yang sama.

src: This report has been confirmed by some expatriates living in the country.
ref: Laporan ini telah dikonfirmasi oleh beberapa ekspatriat yang tinggal di negara tersebut.

src: This recent development in North Korea has given rise to speculation among analysts, some of whom suspected that these may be a sign that Kim is losing power, or that a power struggle is going on among the top leaders of the totalitarian state.
ref: Pembangunan di Korea Utara sekarang ini telah memberikan kenaikan spekulasi diantara para analis, beberapa mencurigai bahwa itu adalah tanda bahwa Kim kehilangan kekuatan, atau perebutan kekuasaan antara penguasa pada negara totaliter.

src: But most observers believe that the portraits were taken down by the order of Kim Jong Il himself, who might be trying to downsize his own personality cult.
ref: Tetapi pengamat percaya bahwa potret tersebut diturunkan atas perintah Kim Jong Il sendiri, yang mungkin mencoba menurunkan pemujaan terhadap dirinya.

src: "We believe the change was made at his will to soften his image as a leader of a personality cult, although it is hard to determine what his real intentions are," said Shinya Kato, the editor of Radiopress.
ref: "Kami percaya bahwa pergantian tersebut dibuat untuk mengurangi gambaran dirinya sebagai pimpinan dari pemujaan dirinya, meskipun sulit menentukan apa niat yang sebenarnya, " kata Shinya Kato, editor dari Radiopress.

src: South Korean officials are not yet speculating on the matter, saying the portrait removals "may be for various reasons."
ref: Pejabat Korea Selatan belum berspekulasi pada hal ini; mengatakan pemindahan potret tersebut "mungkin untuk bermacam-macam alasan."

src: North Korea is one of the few Stalinist states that still exist today, and the political control in the country remains tight.
ref: Korea Utara adalah salah satu dari negara Stalinis yang masih eksis sekarang, dan kontrol politik di negara itu tetap kuat.

src: In recent years North Korea underwent several minor reforms that did not appear to significantly improve quality of life.
ref: Pada beberapa tahun belakangan ini Korea Utara menjalani pembaruan kecil yang tampaknya tidak secara signifikan meingkatkan kualitas hidup.

src: It has also remained largely mysterious and secretive to the outside world, as few foreign correspondents are allowed to visit and stay in the country.
ref: Hal itu juga sebagian besar masih misterius dan rahasia untuk dunia luar, ketika beberapa wartawan asing diizinkan untuk mengunjungi dan tinggal di negara tersebut.

src: BP released their report into the causes of the Deepwater Horizon disaster earlier this year on Wednesday, and shifted much of the blame for the explosion and subsequent oil spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the largest accidental marine oil spill in the history of the petroleum industry, onto , the company managing the rig.
ref: BP merilis laporan mereka pada kasus-kasus bencana Deepwater Horizon lebih awal tahun ini pada hari Rabu, dan menyalahkan penanganan kilang minyak perusahaan tersebut atas ledakan dan tumpahan minyak berikutnya di Teluk Meksiko, yang merupakan kecelakaan terbesar penumpahan minyak di laut dalam sejarah industri perminyakan.

src: The report concludes by stating that decisions made by "multiple companies and work teams" contributed to the accident which it says arose from "a complex and interlinked series of mechanical failures, human judgments, engineering design, operational implementation and team interfaces."
ref: Laporan tersebut menyimpulkan dengan menyatakan keputusan yang dibuat oleh "beberapa perusahaan dan tim kerja" berperan pada kecelakaan yang dikatakan timbul dari "serangkaian kegagalan mekanik yang berkaitan dan kompleks, pertimbangan manusia, desain tehnik, pelaksanaan operasional dan tim interface. "

src: The report, the product of a four-month investigation conducted by BP's Head of Safety Operations, Mark Bly, criticizes the oil rig's fire prevention systems, the crew of the rig for failing to realize and act upon evidence that oil was leaking from the surface of the ocean, and describes how BP and Transocean "incorrectly accepted" negative pressure test results.
ref: Laporan tersebut, merupakan hasil investigasi 4 bulan yang dilakukan oleh Kepala Pengusahaan Keselamatan BP, Mark Bly, mengkritik sistem pencegahan kebakaran di kilang minyak, kru dari kilang tersebut tidak menyadari dan bertindak atas bukti bahwa minyak bocor dari permukaan laut dan menggambarkan bagaimana BP dan Transocean "salah menerima" tekanan negatif dari hasil tes.

src: The document goes on to note that the blow-out preventer failed to operate, likely because critical components were not operational.
ref: Dokumen tersebut selanjutnya mencatat bahwa sistem pencegahan semburan liar telah gagal beroperasi, mungkin karena komponen kritis tidak beroperasi.

src: Bob Dudley, who will become chief executive of BP, described the accident as "tragic".
ref: Bob Dudley, yang akan menjadi kepala eksekutif BP menggambarkan kecelakaan tersebut "tragis. "

src: He said, "we have said from the beginning that the explosion on the Deepwater Horizon was a shared responsibility among many entities."
ref: Dia mengatakan, " Kami telah mengatakan dari semula bahwa ledakan di kilang Deepwater Horizon adalah berbagi tanggung jawab diantara banyak benda. "

src: "This report makes that conclusion even clearer, presenting a detailed analysis of the facts and recommendations for improvement both for BP and the other parties involved."
ref: "Laporan ini membuat kesimpulan lebih jelas, mengemukakan analisa detil dari fakta dan rekomendasi untuk perbaikan baik untuk BP dan pihak lain yang terlibat. "

src: "We have accepted all the recommendations and are examining how best to implement them across our drilling operations worldwide."
ref: "Kami telah menerima semua rekomendasi dan memeriksa bagaimana yang terbaik untuk melaksanakannya di semua operasi pengeboran kami sedunia. "

src: The report included 25 recommendations, according to a press release, "designed to prevent a recurrence of such an accident."
ref: Laporan tersebut termasuk 25 rekomendasi, menurut siaran pers, "didesain untuk mencegah kecelakaan seperti itu terjadi lagi. "

src: The oil company has previously blamed Transocean and Halliburton, the well contractor, for the disaster and BP executives feel they have been unfairly blamed by US politicians for the disaster, and the report continues this view.
ref: Perusahaan minyak tersebut sebelumnya menyalahkan Transocean dan Halliburton, kontraktor sumur minyak, yang menyebabkan bencana dan eksekutif BP merasa mereka tidak adil disalahkan oleh politisi Amerika atas bencana, dan laporan itu berlanjut pada pandangan ini.

src: Tony Hayward, who was fired from the position of BP's chief executive following multiple public relations issues, squarely places the blame for the disaster on Halliburton.
ref: Tony Hayward, yang dipecat dari posisi kepala eksekutif BP mengikuti beberapa isu humas, tempat yang tepat untuk disalahkan atas bencana tesebut yaitu Halliburton.

src: "To put it simply, there was a bad cement job," he said in a statement, also claiming that BP should not be the only company to take the blame for the explosion.
ref: "Singkatnya, terdapat pekerjaan semen yang buruk, " dia berkata di sebuah pernyataan, juga menyatakan bahwa BP seharusnya bukan satu-satunya perusahaan yang bisa disalahkan atas ledakan tersebut.

src: "It would appear unlikely that the well design contributed to the incident," he argues.
ref: "Kelihatannya tidak mungkin bahwa desain sumur minyak berperan pada kejadian tersebut, " dia berargumen.

src: The report blames the type of cement used by Halliburton, designed to prevent harmful hydrocarbons from reaching the seabed, as well as criticizing the crew of Deepwater Horizon, for failing to realize for forty minutes that oil had started to leak from the well, and once it was realized, the crew "vented" the hydrocarbons "directly onto the rig".
ref: Laporan itu menyalahkan jenis semen yang digunakan oleh Halliburton, didesain untuk mencegah hidrokarbon yang berbahaya dari pencapaian dasar laut, maupun mengkritik kru Deepwater Horizon, atas tidak menyadari selama 40 menit bahwa minyak mulai bocor dari sumur dan sekali menyadari, kru tersebut "mengalirkan udara" hidrokarbon" langsung ke kilang. "

src: Describing how the explosion, which killed eleven rig personnel, occurred, the report states that "the heating, ventilation and air conditioning system probably transferred a gas-rich mixture into the engine rooms," where the hydrocarbons ignited and a fireball engulfed the rig.
ref: Penggambara bagaimana ledakan yang menewaskan 11 petugas kilang terjadi, laporan tersebut menyatakan bahwa "pemanasan, ventilasi dan sistem air conditioning mungkin mengalirkan campuran gas yang padat ke arah ruang mesin, " tempat hidrokarbon dinyalakan dan bola api melanda kilang tersebut.

src: But, the report states, the blowout preventer, the ultimate failsafe on the Deepwater Horizon failed, likely due to the fire on the rig.
ref: Tetapi, laporan itu menyatakan pencegahan semburan liar, sistem failsafe terakhir di Deepwater Horizon tidak berfungsi, mungkin mengakibatkan kebakaran di kilang.

src: An automated system was not operational because the batteries powering it, located in a control pod, had gone flat, and another control pod contained a faulty solenoid valve.
ref: Sistem otomatis tidak beroperasi sebab baterei yang menggerakkannya berada di control pod, tidak ada aliran listrik lagi dan control pod yang lain berisi katup solenoid yang rusak.

src: The report was likely, however, written with the company's legal liability for the disaster in a prominent position, since they are facing hundreds of lawsuits and criminal charges as a result of the spill.
ref: Laporan itu mungkin, bagaimanapun ditulis dengan kewajiban hukum perusahaan untuk bencana dalam posisi yang menonjol, sejak mereka menghadapi beratus gugatan hukum dan tuduhan kriminal sebagai akibat penumpahan minyak.

src: The executive summary is four and a half pages long and the first page is made up entirely of legal disclaimers saying if BP was found to be negligent in their operations of the rig, they could be fined a good deal more.
ref: Ringkasan dari eksekutif panjangnnya 4 setengah halaman dan halaman pertama terdiri seluruhnya penyangkalan hukum yang mengatakan jika BP ternyata lalai pada operasi mereka di kilang, mereka bisa didenda lebih besar.

src: Questions have also been raised as to why BP has chosen to release their report before authorities examine the blowout preventer.
ref: Pertanyaan juga muncul seperti mengapa BP memilih untuk merilis laporan mereka sebelum pihak berwenang menyelidiki sistem pencegah semburan liar.

src: The energy editor of The Guardian, Terry Macalister, wrote that the "catalogue of errors - both human and mechanical" in the report "demolish" the oil industry's "much quoted mantra" of safety first.
ref: Editor energi The Guardian, Terry Macalister, menulis bahwa "katalog kesalahan - baik manusia dan mekanikal" di dalam laporan "menghancurkan" industri minyak " lebih banyak sebagaimana mantra" utamakan keselamatan.

src: "It may come first in the board room but it does not down at the wellhead where the real dangers are faced," he wrote.
ref: "Mungkin tiba pertama di ruang dewan pengurus tapi tidak turun di mata air tempat bahaya nyata dihadapi, " tulis dia.

src: "It is worth remembering that BP, its rig operator Transocean and the main well contractor Halliburton are the blue chip companies in the wider oil and gas sector."
ref: "Hal yang bermakna mengingat bahwa BP, Transocean operator kilang dan kontraktor sumur utama Halliburton adalah perusahaan dengan saham yang stabil di sektor minyak secara luas dan gas. "

src: "If the shoddy work practices highlighted here are what the best-in-class do, then what is happening in the lower reaches of this industry?"
ref: " Jika disini pekerjaan buruk praktek terlihat adalah terbaik di kelasnya, kemudian apa yang terjadi di tingkat lebih bawah di industri ini? "

src: Transocean described the report as a "self-serving" attempt to "conceal the critical factor that set the stage for the Macondo incident: BP's fatally flawed well design."
ref: Transocean menggambarkan laporan sebagai sebuah " melayani diri sendiri" upaya untuk " menyembunyikan faktor kritis yang mengatur panggung untuk insiden Macondo: desain bagus cacat fatal milik BP. "

src: "In both its design and construction, BP made a series of cost-saving decisions that increased risk - in some cases, severely."
ref: " Baik desain maupun konstruksinya, BP membuat serangkaian keputusan hemat biaya yang menambah resiko- pada beberapa kasus, sangat parah. "

src: In a statement, the company listed five issues they felt had contributed to the disaster that were no fault but BP's.
ref: Pada pernyataannya, perusahaan tersebut mencatat 5 isu yang mereka rasa berperan pada bencana yang tidak ada kesalahan kecuali BP.

src: "Transocean's investigation is ongoing, and will be concluded when all of the evidence is in, including the critical information the company has requested of BP but has yet to receive."
ref: "Penyelidikan Transocean masih berlangsung, dan akan disimpulkan ketika semua bukti ada, termasuk informasi kritis perusahaan yang diminta BP tapi belum diterima. "

src: Members of Congress, who are also carrying out a review into the disaster, also dismissed the report.
ref: Anggota Kongres, yang juga melakukan tinjauan ulang bencana tersebut juga menolak laporan itu.

src: Ed Markey, the Massachusetts democrat who has been investigating the spill in Congress, said that he felt the report was simply a lengthy defense of the oil company's handling of the spill.
ref: Ed Markey, seorang demokrat Massachusetts yang menyelidiki tumpahan di Kongres, mengatakan bahwa dia merasa laporan itu sekedar pertahanan lama dari perusahaan minyak menangani tumpahan.

src: "BP is happy to slice up blame, as long as they get the smallest piece," he said.
ref: "BP senang mengiris menyalahkan, asalkan mereka mendapatkan potongan terkecil, " katanya.

src: Bly acknowledged during a press conference in Washington that the report did not detail the charges raised against the company in Congress and that BP permitted a culture of recklessness to flourish.
ref: Bly mengakui selama konperensi pers di Washington bahwa laporan itu tidak detil mengemukakan tuntutan melawan perusahaan, di Kongres dan bahwa BP mengijinkan sebuah budaya kecerobohan yang berkembang.

src: He did, however, reject suggestions that cost-cutting had put lives at risk and the rig was a disaster waiting to happen.
ref: Dia bagaimanapun, menolak saran bahwa memotong biaya telah membuat hidup beresiko dan tinggal menunggu bencana di kilang minyak.

src: "What we see instead is, where there were errors made they were based on poor decision-making process or using wrong information," he said.
ref: " Yang kami lihat justru, dimana ada kesalahan dibuat berdasarkan proses pengambilan keputusan yang buruk atau menggunakan informasi yang salah, " katanya.

src: The Guardian reported that "the report is narrowly focused on the final days before the explosion rather than on earlier decisions about well design and safety procedures."
ref: The Guardian melaporkan bahwa, " laporan tersebut berfokus sempit pada hari terakhir sebelum ledakan daripada keputusan awal tentang desain bagus dan prosedur keselamatan. "

src: "No BP officials have been sacked for their role in the explosion, and Bly said there was no indication of any blame beyond the well-site managers."
ref: "Tidak ada pegawai resmi BP yang dipecat karena peran mereka pada ledakan, dan Bly mengatakan tidak ada indikasi menyalahkan diluar manager sumur minyak di lokasi. "

src: The Associated Press reported that Bly "said at a briefing in Washington that the internal report was a reconstruction of what happened on the rig based on the company's data and interviews with mostly BP employees and was not meant to focus on assigning blame."
ref: Assocciated Press melaporkan bahwa Bly " mengatakan pada saat pengarahan di Washington bahwa laporan internal adalah rekonstruksi apa yang terjadi di kilang minyak berdasarkan data perusahaan dan wawancara dengan banyak pegawai BP dan tidak bermaksud memfokuskan penetapan kesalahan. "

src: "The six-person investigating panel only had access to a few workers from other companies, and samples of the actual cement used in the well were not released."
ref: "6 orang panelis penyidik hanya mempunyai akses untuk sedikit pekerja dari perusahaan lain, dan contoh semen yang benar-benar dipakai di sumur minyak, tidak dirilis. "

src: The report continued, "Steve Yerrid, special counsel on the oil spill for Florida Gov. Charlie Crist, said the report clearly shows the company is attempting to spread blame for the well disaster, foreshadowing what will be a likely legal effort to force Halliburton and Transocean, and perhaps others, to share costs such as paying claims and government penalties."
ref: Lanjutan laporan, " Steve Yerrid, penasehat khusus pada masalah tumpahan minyak di Pemerintah Florida. Charlie Crist, mengatakan laporan tersebut jelas menunjukkan perusahaan berusaha meluaskan menyalahkan bencana sumur minyak, membayangkan usaha hukum apa yang mungkin bisa menekan Halliburton dan Transocean, dan kemungkinan lainnya, untuk berbagi biaya seperti membayar tuntutan dan sanksi pemerintah. "

src: Head of Greenpeace's energy campaign Jim Footner said that it was "highly likely that a truly independent report would be even more damning for BP."
ref: Kepala kampanye energi Greenpeace, Jim Footner mengatakan bahwa hal tersebut " kemungkinan besar bahwa laporan yang benar-benar independen akan lebih memberatkan BP. "

src: However, he said, "the real problem is our addiction to oil, which is pushing companies like BP to put lives and the environment at risk."
ref: Meskipun demikian, dia mengatakan, " Masalah sebenarnya adalah ketergantungan kita pada minyak, yang memaksa perusahaan seperti BP menempatkan hidup dan lingkungan di dalam resiko. "

src: "The age of oil is coming to an end and companies like BP will be left behind unless they begin to adapt now."
ref: "Abad perminyakan mendekati berakhir dan perusahaan seperti BP akan tertinggal di belakang jika mereka tidak beradaptasi sekarang. "

src: "The time has come to move beyond oil and invest in clean energy."
ref: "Waktu telah datang untuk bergerak melampaui minyak dan investasi pada energi yang bersih. "

src: Alfred R Sunsen, whose oyster company operating in the Gulf of Mexico is facing the prospect of going out of business after 134 years, reacted angrily the the report.
ref: Alfred R Sunsen, yang pemilik perusahaan tiram yang beroperasi di Teluk Meksiko menghadapi prespek akan keluar dari bisnisnya setelah 134 tahun, bereaksi marah terhadap laporan tersebut.

src: "The report does not address the people, businesses, animals, or natural resources that have been impacted by the disaster and will be dealing with the consequences of their inadequate and slow response to the disaster," he said.
ref: " Laporan tersebut tidak ditujukan untuk rakyat, bisnis, binatang, atau sumber daya alam yang terkena imbas oleh bencana dan akan berkaitan dengan konsekuensi respon terhadap bencana mereka yang tidak memadai dan lambat, " katanya.

src: The New York Times said that the report is "unlikely to carry much weight in influencing the Department of Justice, which is considering criminal and civil charges related to the spill," and described it as "a public relations exercise" and a "probable legal strategy as it prepares to defend itself against possible federal charges, penalties and hundreds of pending lawsuits."
ref: New York Times mengatakan bahwa laporan tersebut " jelas tidak membawa pengaruh yang berat pada Departemen Kehakiman, yang mempertimbangkan kejahatan dan tuntutan perdata berkaitan dengan tumpahan, " dan menggambarkannya sebagai " latihan hubungan masyarakat" dan "strategi hukum yang mungkin sebagai persiapan mempertahankan diri melawan tuntutan pihak federal, sanksi dan beratus gugatan hukum yang tertunda. "

src: Wayne Pennington, head of the geological engineering department at Michigan Technical University, also alleged that BP was wrong to blame other parties involved with the disaster.
ref: Wayne Pennington, kepala departemen tehnik geologi Universitas Michigan Technical, juga menduga bahwa BP bersalah telah menyalahkan pihak lain yang terlibat dengan bencana tersebut.

src: "The blowout and subsequent explosion and spillage appear to the result of an overall attitude that encouraged unwarranted optimism in the quality of each component of the job, allowing the omission of standard testing procedures, and the misinterpretation of other tests in the most-favorable light."
ref: "Semburan liar dan ledakan lanjutan serta tumpahan yang muncul sebagai akibat dari keseluruhan sikap yang didorong optimisme tak beralasan pada kualitas komponen pekerjaan masing-masing, membiarkan penghilangan prosedur tes standar, dan salah interpretasi terhadap tes lain pada cahaya yang paling menguntungkan."

src: He continued: "Instead, skepticism should reign on any drilling job, and testing and evaluation at each stage of the drilling and completion would then be routine; instead of questioning the need for such things as the cement bond log, the companies involved should insist on checking and double-checking quality at each step of the process."
ref: Dia melanjutkan: "Namun, keraguan seharusnya memerintah di pekerjaan pengeboran, dan tes dan evaluasi pada setiap tahap pengeborann dan penyelesaian akan menjadi kerutinan; selain pertanyaan keperluan seperti dokumen evaluasi semen, perusahaan yang terlibat harus menekankan kualitas cek dan dobel cek pada setiap tahap proses."

src: "This was clearly not done, repeatedly, in the case of the Macondo well, and disaster resulted."
ref: "Ini jelas tidak dilakukan, berulang-ulang, dan berakibat pada kasus sumur Macondo, dan bencana ini."

src: 4.9 million barrels of crude oil leaked into the Gulf of Mexico, causing damage to marine and wildlife habitats as well as the Gulf's fishing and tourism industries.
ref: 4,9 juta barel minyak mentah bocor ke Teluk Meksiko, mengakibatkan kerusakan laut dan habitat kehidupan liar serta perikanan Teluk dan industri pariwisata.

src: Extensive measures were used to prevent the oil from reaching the coastline of Louisiana, including skimmer ships, floating containment booms, anchored barriers, and sand-filled barricades.
ref: Tindakan yang lengkap digunakan untuk mencegah minyak dari pencapaian ke garis pantai Lousiana, termasuk kapal pengambil buih, kurungan apung minyak, penghambat berlabuh, dan barikade diisi pasir.

src: Scientists have also reported immense underwater plumes of dissolved oil not visible at the surface.
ref: Ilmuwan juga melaporkan bulu bawah air yang besar akan melarutkan minyak yang tidak kelihatan di permukaan.
