src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
ref: Sebagai hasilnya, asap ganja pemain masuk ke dalam panggung, dan teater itu sendiri mendorong para penonton untuk bergabung.

src: Artistic director Bernhard Glocksin says that the theatre is claiming the metaphorical "artistic licence", to excuse the actions of the actors and audience, which are against German law.
ref: Direktur Artistik Bernhard Glocksin mengatakan bahwa teater tersebut mengklaim kiasan dari "lisensi artistik", untuk memberi alasan tindakan aktor dan penonton, yang melawan undang-undang Jerman.

src: Glocksin was quoted by Ananova as saying opera would be "improved with a few joints and some appetising lines", noting the production was partly an experiment, to see what they could "get away with."
ref: Glocksin dikutip oleh Ananova mengatakan bahwa opera akan menjadi "meningkat dengan beberapa sendi dan baris yang menimbulkan selera", mencatat produksi tersebut sedang dalam percobaan, untuk melihat apa yang mereka bisa "loloskan."

src: "Artistic licence" is at par to an "artistic liberty", where something is exaggerated or changed for the sake of the art itself.
ref: "Lisensi artistik" sejajar dengan "kemerdekaan artistik", dimana sesuatu dianggap berlebihan atau berubah demi seni itu sendiri.

src: For example a visual artist painting a landscape might move a tree to another area of their work, for better balance, or a poet ignoring pentameter when writing a traditional sonnet.
ref: Sebagai contoh seorang seniman visual lukisan lanskap mungkin berpindah dari pohon ke daerah yang lain pada pekerjaannya, untuk keseimbangan yang lebih baik, atau seorang penyair yang mengabaikan pentameter ketika menulis soneta tradisional.

src: The BBC's political debate show Question Time aired a special edition from Shanghai yesterday.
ref: Tayangan debat politik BBC Question Time ditayangkan pada edisi spesial dari Shanghai kemarin.

src: This was the first time that a political show from the West was made in China.
ref: Ini adalah yang pertama kalinya tayangan politik dari Barat yang dibuat di Cina.

src: The show was broadcast on BBC One and BBC World; however, it wasn't shown in China, as a condition of the programme amid fears that it would be inflammatory and present negative views of the government.
ref: Tayangan tersebut disiarkan oleh BBC One dan BBC World; namun, tidak ditayangkan di Cina, sebagai kondisi dari program tersebut di tengah ketakutan bahwa itu akan menghasut dan memberikan pandangan negatif dari pemerintah tersebut.

src: The panel contained the Chinese politician Liu Jianchao,who is the Chinese foreign ministry spokesman and Long Yongtu who is General Secretary for the Boao Forum for Asia, together with Chris Patten, the last Governor of Hong Kong, Isobel Hilton, a writer who has a large knowledge of China & David Tang, fashion designer.
ref: Jurinya terdiri dari politikus Cina Liu Jianchao, yang menjadi juru bicara kementerian luar negeri Cina dan Long Yongtu yang menjadi sekretaris Jenderal dari Forum Boao untuk Asia, bersama dengan Chris Patten, Gubernur Hong Kong terakhir, Isobel Hilton, penulis yang berwawasan luas atas Cina & David Tang, desainer fashion.

src: The audience contained a mixture of Chinese and Westerners together with people invited by the government.
ref: Penonton terdiri dari campuran antara Cina dan Barat bersama dengan orang yang diundang oleh pemerintah.

src: The questions concerned, among other things, the next chief-executive of Hong Kong, China's attitudes toward Taiwan, whether China has growing problems concerning spoilt children, the growing human rights question, and whether China will economically overtake America in 20 years time.
ref: Pertanyaannya menyangkut banyak hal yang lain, kepala eksekutif Hong Kong yang akan datang, sikap Cina terhadap Taiwan, apakah Cina mempunyai masalah pertumbuhan menyangkut anak, pertanyaan tentang pertumbuhan hak asasi manusia, dan apakah Cina akan mengambil alih Amerika secara ekonomi dalam 20 tahun.

src: Many members of the audience liked the show and hoped a similar show will be broadcast in China, in a few years time.
ref: Banyak anggota dari penonton menyukai tayangan tersebut dan mengharap tayangan seperti itu akan disiarkan di Cina, dalam beberapa tahun lagi.

src: The program, which was part of a week-long BBC focus on China, was hailed as a sign that China was becoming more liberal and accommodating to Western media presence and involvement in China.
ref: Program tersebut, yang menjadi bagian dari minggu panjang BBC yang dipusatkan di Cina, menyerukan sebuah tanda bahwa Cina menjadi lebih liberal dan mengakomodasi kehadiran dan keterlibatan media Barat di Cina.

src: At least 19 people have been killed in central Florida in the city of Lady Lake and Paisley after severe storms and a tornado ripped through the cities in the middle of the night.
ref: Sedikitnya 19 orang tewas di pusat Florida di kota Lady Lake dan Piasley setelah badai hebat dan tornado menghancurkan kota-kota tersebut di tengah malam.

src: Eleven of those killed were in Paisley and three were in Lady Lake.
ref: Sebelas yang tewas berada di Paisley dan tiga berada di Lady Lake.

src: The death toll is expected to rise as rescue crews resume tomorrow morning.
ref: Korban tewas diperkirakan bertambah karena para kru penyelamat akan kembali lagi besok pagi.

src: Volusia, Sumter, Lake and Seminole counties have all been declared a state of an emergency as dozens of houses, mobile homes and a church were destroyed.
ref: Negara-negara bagian Volusia, Sumter, Lake dan Seminole dinyatakan sebagai negara bagian dalam keadaan darurat karena puluhan rumah, rumah mobil dan gereja telah hancur.

src: Clothes and furniture are scattered around the wrecked houses and pieces of trees are scattered about.
ref: Baju-baju dan perabot berserakan di sekitar rumah-rumah yang hancur dan puing-puing pohon yang berserakan.

src: Cars are reported to have been turned over or thrown around in the air.
ref: Mobil-mobil dilaporkan telah berputar atau terlempar di udara.

src: "Our priority today is search and rescue," said Gov. of Florida, Charlie Crist.
ref: "Prioritas kami hari ini adalah mencari dan menyelamatkan", ujar Gubernur Florida, Charlie Crist.

src: Rescuers are still looking through the wreckage to find survivors of those who might have been killed.
ref: Para petugas penyelamat masih terus mencari di antara puing-puing untuk menemukan korban selamat diantara mereka yang tewas.

src: A spokeman for the emergency response team of Lake county, Chris Patton calls the damage "devastating" and worse than "hurricanes in 2004."
ref: Seorang juru bicara untuk tim tanggap darurat negara bagian Lake, Chris Patton menyebut kerusakannya "dahsyat" dan lebih buruk daripada "badai pada tahun 2004."

src: "We have complete devastation of homes, of businesses, religious institutions.
ref: "Kami mendapatkan kerusakan parah pada rumah-rumah, bisnis dan institusi-institusi keagamaan.

src: It was unlike even perhaps the hurricanes of 2004 when we had minor roof damage, screen damage, pool damage.
ref: Itu tidak seperti hal tersebut bahkan badai pada tahun 2004 saat kami mendapati kerusakan atap, kasa pintu dan jendela, kolam renang.

src: A politician from Spain's ruling Socialist Party has been killed in Spain's northern Basque region, in the town of Mondragon.
ref: Seorang politisi dari Partai Sosialis yang berkuasa di Spanyol telah terbunuh di wilayah Basque di utara Spanyol, di kota Mondragon.

src: The shooting came just two days before general elections in Spain.
ref: Penembakan terjadi hanya dua hari sebelum pemilihan umum di Spanyol.

src: Isaías Carrasco, 42, was shot outside his house in front of his wife and daughter and was taken to hospital, where he died of his wounds.
ref: Isaias Carrasco, 42, ditembak di luar rumahnya di depan istri dan anak perempuannya dan kemudian dibawa ke rumah sakit, tempat dia meninggal akibat lukanya.

src: No group has claimed the attack but Spanish sources said the attack was probably carried out by the Basque separatist group, considered as a terrorist group by European Union and United States, ETA.
ref: Tidak ada kelompok yang mengakui serangan tersebut, tetapi sumber Spanyol mengatakan penyerangan itu mungkin dilakukan oleh kelompok separatis Basque, ETA, yang dianggap sebagai kelompok teroris oleh Uni Eropa dan Amerika Serikat.

src: Spain is in the final day of official campaigning ahead of Sunday's general election, in which the Socialist prime minister Rodriguez Zapatero is seeking a second term.
ref: Spanyol tengah berada pada hari terakhir kampanye resmi menjelang pemilihan umum pada hari Minggu, saat perdana menteri Sosialis Rodrigues Zapatero mengincar kesempatan kedua.

src: The conservative opposition Partido Popular has focused his campaign in the terrorism and separatism, especially that of the Basque.
ref: Oposisi konservatif Partido Popular memfokuskan kampanyenya dalam terorisme dan separatisme, terutama di Basque.

src: After the shooting the main parties announced a halt to campaigning.
ref: Setelah penembakan tersebut partai-partai utama mengumumkan penghentian kampanye.

src: According to the polls, the two parties are neck and neck in the race for the election.
ref: Menurut jajak pendapat, kedua partai seimbang dalam persaingan untuk pemilihan umum.

src: Two CH-47 Chinook helicopters were called in on Wednesday, September 2nd, to help contain the wildfires on the Hawaiian Island of Molokai.
ref: Dua helikopter CH-47 Chinhook telah dipanggil pada hari Rabu, 2 September, untuk membantu membatasi kebakaran di Molokai Kepulauan Hawai.

src: Smaller helicopters that were fighting the fire since it started around noon on August 29th were redeployed as well.
ref: Helikopter-helikopter yang lebih kecil yang telah memadamkan kebakaran sejak mulai terbakar sekitar tanggal 29 Agustus siang juga telah dikerahkan.

src: According to Gen Iinuma, Maui County Civil Defense administrator, the CH-47s carry 2000-gallon buckets of water, whereas the smaller helicopters only have 100-gallon buckets.
ref: Menurut Gen Iinuma, administrator Pertahan Sipil Daerah Maui, CH-47 membawa 2.000 galon air, dimana helikopter-helikopter yanng lebih kecil hanya memiliki 100 galon.

src: The Chinooks can dump more water in fewer trips than the smaller helicopters.
ref: Chinhook tersebut dapat membuang air lebih banyak dalam lebih sedikit perjalanan dari pada para helikopter yang lebih kecil.

src: On the other hand, the tremendous downdraft from the bigger aircraft may make the fire worse.
ref: Namun dalam hal lainnya, hembusan angin ke bawah yang dahsyat dari pesawat yang lebih besar dapat membuat kebakaran menjadi lebih buruk.

src: "If they don't do it right, they'll fan the fire," Iinuma said.
ref: "Bila mereka tidak melakukannya dengan benar, mereka akan mengipasi apinya, " Iinuma mengatakan.

src: According to Iinuma, ground crews are continuing to maintain the fire's perimeter, which remained unchanged from Tuesday.
ref: Menurut Iinuma, para kru di darat melanjutkan untuk mempertahankan batas kebakaran, yang tetap tidak berubah sejak hari Selasa.

src: The helicopters are being used to fight the fires where ground crews can't reach, such as steep mountain passes and valleys.
ref: Helikopter-helikopter tersebut digunakan untuk melawan kebakaran dimana kru darat tidak dapat mencapainya.

src: Iinuma also expressed concern about a red flag advisory the National Weather service put out for all leeward areas of the Hawaiian Islands, meaning conditions are ripe for fires.
ref: Iinuma juga mengungkapkan keprihatinannya tentang sebuah tanda bendera merah yang diletakkan oleh pelayanan Cuaca Nasional pada semua daerah Kepulauan Hawai, yang berarti kondisi tersebut siap dilanda kebakaran.

src: Lieutenant Governor James "Duke" Aiona, who took an aerial survey of Molokai's brush fire area, said it was "no immediate threat".
ref: Wakil Gubernur James "Duke" Aiona, yang mengambil sebuah pengamatan udara di daerah kebakaran semak Molokai, mengatakan bahwa "tidak ada ancaman langsung."

src: He also noted that the fire seemed to come right up to the perimeter of some properties, but almost always stopped there.
ref: Dia juga mencatat bahwa kebakaran tersebut terlihat membakar hingga batas dari beberapa properti, namun hampir selalu berhenti disana.

src: Aiona's observations are mirrored by a local business owners' story.
ref: Pengamatan Aiona juga dicerminkan oleh cerita seorang pemilik usaha lokal.

src: The wildfires destroyed the beehives of Molokai Meli, a family-owned honey business in Kapaakea, but residents admit that the beehives were not their main concern.
ref: Kebakaran besar tersebut menghancurkan sarang-sarang lebah Molokai Meli, seorang pengusaha madu perusahaan keluarga di Kapaakea, namun warga mengakui bahwa sarang-sarang lebah tersebut bukanlah perhatian utama mereka.

src: "We were just beating the edges with wet towels and sheets to try and keep it from getting to the houses that are just right over that ridge," said co-owner Brenda Kaneshiro.
ref: "Kami hanya memukul di sudut-sudut dengan handuk dan kain basah untuk mencoba dan menjaganya agar tidak memasuki rumah-rumah yang berada diatas punggung bukit tersebut, " kata pemilik Brenda Kaneshiro.

src: "All that metal right there, that's where they all were, there were 33 of them," said Elijah Kaneshiro, the owner's son.
ref: "Semua logam di sana, disanalah mereka tadinya, ada 33 dari mereka, " kata Elijah Kaneshiro, anak lelaki pemilik tersebut.

src: Jean Chrétien, one of Canada's former prime ministers, received quadruple heart bypass surgery yesterday at Montreal's Heart Institute.
ref: Jean Chretien, salah satu mantan perdana menteri Kanada, menerima empat kali operasi kemarin di Institute Jantung Montreal.

src: He's well and he's recuperating very well at the moment.
ref: Dia sehat dan penyembuhan dia sangat baik pada saat itu.

src: "His outcome is excellent," said Chief of surgery, Dr. Michel Pellerin.
ref: "Hasil kesehatannya sempurna, " ujar Kepala pembedahan, Dr. Michel Pellerin.

src: He could have risked his life as he was diagnosed with unstable angina.
ref: Dia dapat membahayakan hidupnya ketika dia di-diagnosa dengan penyakit radang tidak stabil.

src: It is caused by obstructed arteries, which causes heart pain in a person's body.
ref: Itu disebabkan oleh terhambatnya pembuluh nadi, yang menyebabkan sakit jantung di badan seseorang.

src: The golfer told him to see a doctor as soon as possible.
ref: Pemain golf berkata kepadanya untuk menemui seorang dokter secepat mungkin.

src: "He had a bit of discomfort and mentioned it because there was a doctor there," said a friend of Chrétien, Eddie Goldenberg.
ref: "Dia sedikit tidak nyaman dan menyebutkannya karena ada seorang dokter di sana, " ujar seorang teman Chretien, Eddie Goldenberg.

src: "The doctor asked him a couple of questions and said, 'You better come and see me.'"
ref: "Dokter tersebut bertanya kepadanya beberapa pertanyaan dan berkata, 'Anda sebaiknya datang dan menemui saya'."

src: He had to postpone his speech at the Asia-Pacific mining conference in Vancouver, B.C..
ref: Dia harus lebih dulu menunda pidatonya pada konfrensi tambang Asia-Pasifik di Vancouver, B. C.

src: Australia has defeated New Zealand by 44 runs in the one off Twenty20 international match at Eden Park.
ref: Australia telah mengalahkan Selandia Baru dengan 44 run dalam satu off di pertandingan internasional Twenty20 di Eden Park.

src: This victory, in the first full international Twenty20 match, gave Australia a unique treble having won the first ever test match and then the first ever limited overs international.
ref: Kemenangan ini, dalam satu pertandingan internasional penuh Twenty20 pertamanya, memberi Australia suatu treble yang unik dengan memenangkan pertandingan uji coba pertamanya dan kemudian pertandingan internasional overs limited pertamanya.

src: Batting first, Australia set a total of 214, with Australian captain Ricky Ponting top scoring with 98 runs from 55 balls, including 8 fours and 5 sixes.
ref: Melakukan pukulan terlebih dulu, Australia menghasilkan total 214, dengan kapten Australia Ricky Ponting menjadi pencetak skor terbanyak dengan 98 run dari 55 bola, termasuk 8 four dan 5 six.

src: New Zealand's Kyle Mills led the bowling attack with 3 for 44.
ref: Kyle Mills dari Selandia Baru memimpin serangan boling dengan 3 untuk 44.

src: Scott Styris top scored for New Zealand with 66 runs from 39 balls.
ref: Scott Styris menjadi pencetak angka terbanya dengan 66 run dari 39 bola.

src: Australian paceman Michael Kasprowicz finished the match with figures of 4 for 29 from his 4 overs.
ref: Paceman Australia Michael Kasprowicz mengakhiri pertandingan dengan angka 4 untuk 29 dari 4 over.

src: The New Zealand team had dressed in the 1980s beige uniform for the occasion.
ref: Tim Selandia Baru memakai seragam krem tahun 1980-an untuk pertandingan ini.

src: Many had also grown facial hair suiting the 1980s for the match.
ref: Beberapa pemain juga menumbuhkan jenggot sesuai dengan tren tahun 1980-an untuk pertandingan ini.

src: The teams now go on to play a one-day series followed by a test match series.
ref: Kedua tim ini sekarang maju untuk memainkan 1 seri pertandingan 1 hari yang diikuti dengan 1 seri pertandingan uji coba.

src: Major British charity Comic Relief has invested money in arms, alcohol and tobacco firms, according to a BBC Panorama investigation to be broadcast this evening.
ref: Lembaga amal utama Inggris Comic Relief telah menginvestasikan uang mereka pada perusahaan-perusahaan senjata, alkohol dan tembakau, berdasarkan investigasi BBC Panorama yang akan disiarkan malam ini.

src: The probe discovered evidence of hundreds of thousands of pounds going towards shares in weapons firms like BAE Systems and alcohol company Diageo.
ref: Penyelidikan tersebut menemukan bukti ratusan ribu poundsterling akan digunakan dalam saham untuk perusahaan senjata seperti BAE Systems dan perusahaan alkohol Diageo.

src: It is also alleged to have pledged upwards of £3 million into tobacco firms.
ref: Lembaga ini juga dituduh telah menjaminkan 3 juta Poundsterling ke dalam perusahaan-perusahaan tembakau.

src: Ethical fund manager Helen Wildsmith told Panorama: "If people who've been giving them money, after watching the television, next year think twice and don't give that money, because they're concerned about their investment policy, then that could be argued to be a breach of fiduciary duty.
ref: Pengelola dana etis Helen Wildsmith berkata pada Panorama, "Jika orang-orang yang telah memberi mereka uang, setelah melihat televisi, tahun depan mereka akan berpikir 2 kali dan tidak mendonasikan uang mereka, karena mereka sangat peduli terhadap kebijakan investasi mereka, lalu mereka dapat berargumen bahwa mereka berhak melanggar kewajiban fidusianya.

src: They're risking their reputation, and a charity's reputation is very precious."
ref: Mereka mempertaruhkan reputasi mereka, dan reputasi amal itu sangat berharga."

src: Comic Relief was founded in 1985, and since then has taken in nearly £1 billion in donations.
ref: Comic Relief ditemukan pada tahun 1985, dan sejak saat itu telah mengambil donasi hampir sebesar 1 miliar Poundsterling.

src: It funds charitable organisations in the United Kingdom as well as overseas.
ref: Lembaga ini mendanai organisasi amal di Inggris Raya dan juga di negara-negara lainnya.

src: It uses a range of managed funds, which invests the money in the charity's name - including on the stock market - in order to maximise return.
ref: Lembaga ini menggunakan berbagai dana yang dikelola, yang menginvestasikan uang mereka ke dalam nama amal - termasuk di pasar saham - untuk memaksimalkan keuntungan.

src: A spokesperson for the charity told the British newspaper The Daily Telegraph: "We put the money into large managed funds, as many other leading charities and pension funds do.
ref: Seorang juru bicara lembaga amal itu berkata kepada surat kabar Inggris Daily Telegraph, "Kami menaruh uang ke dalam pengelolaan dana yang besar, sama seperti apa yang biasa dilakukan lembaga amal dan dana pensiun ternama.

src: On balance, we believe this is the approach that will deliver the greatest benefits to the most vulnerable people."
ref: Sisi imbangnya, kami percaya bahwa ini adalah pendekatan yang akan mengirimkan keuntungan terbesar untuk orang-orang yang berkekurangan."

src: The controversial investments were made between 2007 and 2009, Panorama explains.
ref: Investasi kontroversial ini dilakukan antara tahun 2007 dan 2009, Panorama menjelaskan.

src: Peter Bennett-Jones, former chair of the company, defended the investments in a post on The Guardians website.
ref: Peter Bennett-Jones, mantan pemimpin lembaga itu, membela investasi-investasi tersebut dalam sebuah pernyataan di situs web The Guardians.

src: He said: "The Charity Commission guidance is quite clear that trustees must invest for the best possible financial return, while taking a level of risk appropriate for money in their care.
ref: Dia berkata: "Petunjuk Komisi Amal sudah cukup jelas bahwa para pengurus lembaga harus mengivestasikan untuk keuntungan yang paling besar, sementara mengambil level resiko yang sepadan untuk dana yang mereka kelola.

src: They should only adopt an ethical investment approach with specific justification and not on the grounds of individual moral views.
ref: Mereka seharusnya hanya mengadopsi sebuah pendekatan investasi etis dengan pembenaran yang spesifik dan bukan pada ranah pandangan moral perorangan."

src: Robert Mugabe, the Zimbabwean president who has recently been widely criticized by world leaders, has claimed the current results show that he will have a 'sweeping victory' in the unopposed presidential run-off elections.
ref: Robert Mugabe, Presiden Zimbabwe yang baru-baru ini telah dikritik secara luas oleh para pemimpin dunia, telah mengklaim hasil saat ini menunjukkan dia akan memiliki 'kemenangan besar'dalam pemilihan ulang presiden.

src: Mugabe announced his victory on one of the state run television networks.
ref: Mugabe mengumumkan kemenangannya di salah satu jaringan TV yang dijalankan pemerintah.

src: "The returns show that we are winning convincingly, that we have won in all the 26 constituencies in Harare, an MDC stronghold where we won in only one constituency in March," he said.
ref: "Hasil pemilihan menunjukkan bahwa kami menang meyakinkan, bahwa kami telah menang di semua 26 konstituen di Harare, kubu pertahanan MCD tempat kami hanya menang satu konstituen di bulan Maret, " katanya.

src: Robert Mugabe was recently under a large amount of pressure to postpone the election after the main opposition candidate, Morgan Tsvangirai, pulled out due to fears of violence.
ref: Robert Mugabe baru-baru ini menghadapi sejumlah tekanan besar untuk menunda pemilihan umum setelah calon oposisi utama, Morgan Tsvangirai, ditarik keluar karena ancaman kekerasan.

src: For example, Ban Ki-moon, secretary general of the United Nations yesterday called for the election to be postponed.
ref: Sebagai contoh, Ban Ki-moon, Sekjen PBB kemarin menyerukan agar pemilihan umum ditunda.

src: He said that he "strongly supports the statement of the Chairman of SADC (Southern African Development Community) that conditions do not exist for a run-off election to be held at this time and that they should be postponed."
ref: Dia mengatakan bahwa dia "sangat mendukung pernyataan Ketua SADC (Southern African Development Community) kondisi tidak layak untuk menjalankan pemilihan ulang untuk diadakan saat ini dan mereka harus ditunda."

src: Scotland has refused bail to the Libyan man convicted of the bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 despite his terminal cancer, as he can receive treatment in prison.
ref: Skotlandia telah menolak jaminan untuk orang Libya yang dihukum karena pemboman Pan Am Nomor Penerbangan 103 meskipun ia menderita kanker stadium akhir, karena ia dapat menerima pengobatan di penjara.

src: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi was jailed in 2001 for the 1988 bombing of the transatlantic airliner, killing 270 people, but is seeking to have his conviction overturned.
ref: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi dipenjara pada tahun 2001 untuk pemboman pesawat yang melintasi Samudera Atlantik tahun 1988, menewaskan 270 orang, tetapi berusaha untuk membatalkan hukumannya.

src: Minutes after Edinburgh's Appeals Court rejected bail on compassionate grounds Jim Swire, spokesman for the victim's families who lost his daughter in the disaster, complained about the ruling.
ref: Beberapa menit setelah Pengadilan Banding Edinburgh menolak uang jaminan atas dasar kemanusiaan Jim Swire, juru bicara keluarga korban yang kehilangan putrinya dalam bencana tersebut, mengeluhkan putusan itu.

src: "It has never been a goal of our group to seek revenge," said a lawyer outside the court reading from his statement.
ref: "Ini tidak pernah menjadi tujuan kelompok kami untuk membalas dendam, " kata pengacara di luar pengadilan membaca pernyataannya.

src: "The refusal of a return to his family for a dying man whose verdict is not even yet secure looks uncomfortably like either an aspect of revenge -- or perhaps timidity."
ref: "Penolakan kembali ke keluarganya untuk seorang pria sekarat yang vonisnya bahkan belum terlihat aman nyaman seperti salah satu aspek dari balas dendam -- atau mungkin kelambanan."

src: Al-Megrahi, a former intelligence officer, is 54 and serving a minimum of 27 years for the bombing.
ref: Al-Megrahi, seorang mantan perwira intelijen, usia 54 dan dihukum minimal 27 tahun untuk pengeboman.

src: He has advanced prostate cancer which is spreading through his body.
ref: Dia telah terkena kanker prostat yang menyebar ke seluruh tubuhnya.

src: His request for bail was rejected by Lord Hamilton, Scotland's head judge, who said that as doctors say he could live a few more years he should not be released unless and until after his appeal succeeds or his condition worsens.
ref: Permintaannya untuk jaminan ditolak oleh Lord Hamilton, kepala hakim Skotlandia, yang mengatakan seperti yang dikatakan dokter dia bisa hidup beberapa tahun lagi dia tidak harus dibebaskan kecuali dan sampai setelah bandingnya berhasil atau kondisinya memburuk.

src: Some other doctors give his time as just months, as the cancer has reached his bones.
ref: Beberapa dokter lainnya memberi waktu hanya beberapa bulan, karena kanker telah mencapai tulangnya.

src: Hamilton however said that palliative hormone treatment could prolong his life.
ref: Namun Hamilton mengatakan bahwa terapi hormon pereda bisa memperpanjang hidupnya.

src: Hamilton also said Al-Megrahi was not suffering "material pain or disability".
ref: Hamilton juga mengatakan Al-Megrahi tidak menderita "sakit materi atau cacat."

src: The Scottish Criminal Cases Review Commission ruled last year that the conviction may be a miscarriage of justice.
ref: Komisi Peninjau Kasus Pidana Skotlandia memutuskan tahun lalu bahwa vonis mungkin kehilangan keadilan.

src: It said there was significant doubts to be raised over several key pieces of evidence in the original trial.
ref: Dia juga mengatakan ada keraguan signifikan untuk memunculkan beberapa bukti kunci dalam persidangan aslinya.

src: In the hills of Weiswampach, Luxembourg yesterday, the 12th International Wämper Triathlon became the setting for the national championship Olympic distance (1,5 km swimming, 40 km cycling, 10 km running) triathlon for both Belgium and Luxembourg.
ref: Di perbukitan Weiswampach, Luksemburg kemarin, Wämper Triatlon International ke-12 menjadi pengatur jarak Olimpiade kejuaraan nasional (1,5 km renang, 40 km bersepeda, 10 km berjalan) lomba triatlon untuk Belgia dan Luksemburg.

src: The Belgian championship was scheduled to take place in Vilvoorde, Belgium, but because the concentration of Salmonella bacteria in the water was too high, the Belgians moved to Luxembourg.
ref: Kejuaraan Belgia tersebut dijadwalkan berlangsung di Vilvoorde, Belgia, tetapi karena kadar bakteri Salmonella di air terlalu tinggi, kejuaraan Belgia pindah ke Luksemburg.

src: On Saturday, an event for children and for the handicapped took place, along with the 10 kilometre running event.
ref: Pada hari Sabtu, sebuah acara untuk anak-anak dan orang cacat diselenggarakan, bersamaan dengan acara lari 10 kilometer.

src: On Sunday, the Juniors and the athletes for the Promotion race started the day, followed at 15:00 by the elite athletes.
ref: Pada hari Minggu, para Junior dan para atlet balapan Promosi memulai hari itu, dilanjutkan pukul 15.00 oleh para atlet elit.

src: Even though dark clouds hung over Weiswampach most of the afternoon, there was only a short rain shower during the cycling course.
ref: Meskipun awan gelap menggantung di atas Weiswampach sepanjang sore, hanya hujan gerimis singkat selama lomba bersepeda.

src: In the men's race, Peter Croes (Belgium, Atriac team) and Dirk Bockel (Luxembourg, Celtic Diekirck team) started together for the final 10 kilometre run, but Bockel managed to outrun Croes by 23 seconds, prolonging his victory of last year.
ref: Dalam lomba lari pria, Peter Croes (Belgia, tim Atriac) dan Dirk Bockel (Luksemburg, tim Celtic tim Diekirck) mulai bersama-sama dalam final 10 kilometer lari, tapi Bockel berhasil berlari lebih cepat 23 detik dari Croes, memperpanjang kemenangannya tahun lalu.

src: Last year's winner, Stijn Goris from Belgium (LTTL team), came in third, followed closely by Bas Diederen from the Netherlands.
ref: Pemenang tahun lalu, Stijn Goris dari Belgia (tim LTTL), berada di posisi ke-3, diikuti dari dekat oleh Bas Diederen dari Belanda.

src: In the women's race, the top two athletes remained the same as last year; Elisabeth "Liz" May from Luxembourg managed to stay ahead of a pursuing group the entire race, and finished first ahead of Jessica Mayon.
ref: Dalam lomba lari perempuan, atas 2 atlet teratas tetap sama seperti tahun lalu; Elisabeth "Liz" May dari Luksemburg berhasil tetap berada di depan kelompok diikuti seluruh peserta, dan selesai pertama kali di depan Jessica Mayon.

src: Mayon secured the title of Belgian 1/4 Triathlon champion, in addition to the previously won Sprint Triathlon and Long Distance championships.
ref: Mayon mengamankan gelar kejuaraan triatlon1/4 Belgia, sebagai tambahan kemenangan Lomba lari Triatlon sebelumnya dan kejuaraan Jarak Jauh.

src: British MPs on the Commons Environmental Audit Committee warn Britain could face widespread electrical blackouts if new generating capacity is not added soon.
ref: Anggota parlemen Inggris pada Komite Audit Lingkungan Parlemen Rendah memperingatkan Inggris bisa menghadapi pemadaman listrik meluas jika kapasitas pembangkit baru tidak ditambahkan segera.

src: Clean and renewable generating methods will be preferred in the Government's energy review, including a return to nuclear power generation.
ref: Metode pembangkit yang bersih dan dapat diperbarui akan lebih disukai dalam tinjauan energi Pemerintah, termasuk kembali ke pembangkit tenaga nuklir.

src: But the committee warned that no new nuclear power plants are expected to come online until at least 2017 with the proposed network not reaching full capacity until as late as 2030.
ref: Tapi panitia memperingatkan bahwa tidak ada pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir baru yang diharapkan beroperasi sampai setidaknya 2017 dengan jaringan yang diusulkan tidak mencapai kapasitas penuh sampai akhir 2030.

src: Meanwhile nearly a quarter of Britain's current generating capacity is scheduled to go offline by 2016, creating a shortfall described by the committee as a "generation gap" which could not be bridged by nuclear energy.
ref: Sementara itu hampir seperempat dari kapasitas pembangkit Inggris saat ini dijadwalkan untuk tidak dipakai sampai paling lambat pada tahun 2016, menciptakan kekurangan yang dijelaskan oleh panitia sebagai "kesenjangan generasi" yang tidak bisa dijembatani oleh energi nuklir.

src: "Very substantial investment in new generating capacity and energy efficiency will be required if the lights are to stay on," committee chairman Conservative MP Tim Yeo said.
ref: "Investasi yang sangat besar dalam kapasitas pembangkit baru dan efisiensi energi akan diperlukan jika lampu terus menyala, " kata ketua panitia Anggota Parlemen Konservatif Tim Yeo.

src: The committee stated that an "extensive" building programme of new gas-fired power stations would be needed to meet the predicted shortfall.
ref: Komite tersebut menyatakan bahwa program pembangunan "luas" dari pembangkit listrik baru berbahan bakar gas akan diperlukan untuk memenuhi kekurangan yang diprediksi.

src: The committee's statement drew some support from environmentalists as well as from some energy sector industries.
ref: Pernyataan komite menarik dukungan dari pemerhati lingkungan serta dari beberapa industri sektor energi.

src: Friends of the Earth was cautiously cheered by the committee's commitment to energy efficiency, and support of reduced emissions.
ref: Para sahabat bumi itu gembira dengan waspada oleh komitmen komite untuk efisiensi energi, dan dukungan untuk pengurangan emisi.

src: "...people understand renewables is the next big thing and we should get on with it," said Maf Smith, CEO of Scottish Renewables to BBC.
ref: ." .orang memahami energi yang dapat diperbarui adalah hal besar berikutnya dan kami harus melanjutkannya, " kata Maf Smith, CEO dari Skotlandia Renewables kepada BBC.

src: On Friday, May 27, 2005, 9 trains on the New York City Subway will make their final run, ending rush-hour skip-stop service on the IRT Broadway-Seventh Avenue Line north of 137th Street-City College.
ref: Pada hari Jumat, 27 Mei, 2005, 9 kereta bawah tanah di New York City akan membuat perjalanan terakhir mereka, mengakhiri jam-jam sibuk dengan layanan berhenti dan lewat dari IRT Broadway-Seventh Avenue Jalur utara dari Jalan 137-City College.

src: During rush hours, the 9 is a skip-stop supplement to the 1, running the same route but skipping some stops in Upper Manhattan and the Bronx.
ref: Selama jam sibuk, 9 adalah layanan tambahan berhenti dan lewat ke 1, berjalan di rute yang sama tapi melewatkan beberapa perhentian di Upper Manhattan dan Bronx.

src: At the same time, the 1 skips other stops, which are only served by the 9 at rush hours; some stops are served by all trains.
ref: Pada saat yang sama, 1 melewatkan perhentian lain, yang hanya dilayani oleh 9 di jam sibuk; beberapa perhentian dilayani oleh semua kereta.

src: This service pattern results in slightly faster trains, but longer waits for those going to or from skipped stations.
ref: Pola pelayanan seperti ini menghasilkan kereta yang sedikit lebih cepat, tapi menunggu lebih lama bagi mereka yang akan menuju atau berangkat dari stasiun yang dilewati.

src: 9 service was started on December 12, 1988, at first running during rush hours and middays.
ref: Layanan 9 dimulai pada tanggal 12 Desember 1988, pada perjalanan pertama selama jam sibuk dan tengah hari.

src: The 2008 Taipei Game Show, organized by the Taipei Computer Association (TCA), ended on Monday, and was different from shows of past years.
ref: Pertunjukan Permainan Taipei tahun 2008, diselenggarakan oleh Asosiasi Komputer Taipei (TCA), berakhir pada hari Senin, dan berbeda dari pertunjukan tahun lalu.

src: This could be seen in the gaming population, industry, and exhibition arrangements.
ref: Ini bisa dilihat di populasi permainan, industri, dan pengaturan pameran.

src: Canadian researchers from C-crest Laboratories have discovered an "unusually high" amount of bacteria in bottled water.
ref: Peneliti berkebangsaan Kanada dari C-crest Laboratories telah menemukan jumlah bakteri yang "tinggi yang tidak biasa" di botol air.

src: Researchers don't blame specific brands, but bottled water in general.
ref: Peneliti tersebut tidak menyalahkan merk khusus, tapi botol air pada umumnya.

src: A random study found unusually high rates of heterotrophic bacteria in the bottled water, more than 500 cfu, the legal limit set by United States Pharmacopeia on how much bacteria should be present in drinking water in Canada.
ref: Sebuah studi acak menemukan tingkat yang tidak biasa tinggi bakteri heterotropik di botol air, lebih dari 500 cfu, batas ukuran sesuai hukum yang ditetapkan Pharmacopeia Amerika pada jumlah bakteri yang harus ada pada air minum di Kanada.

src: Unusually high amounts of bacteria were present in 70% of the test samples across several brands of bottled water.
ref: Jumlah tinggi yang tidak biasa dari bakteri yang ada pada 70% sampel tes berbagai jenis merk air botolan.

src: “Heterotrophic bacteria counts in some of the bottles were found to be in revolting figures of (100) times more than the permitted limit,” said Sonish Azam, a Canadian researcher involved in the study, “This amount of bacteria is alarming, as if we are ingesting a cup of culture.”
ref: "Bakteri heterotropik yang dihitung di beberapa botol ditemukan jumlah yang menjijikkan (100) kali lebih dari batas yang diijinkan, " kata Sonish Azam, peneliti Kanada yang terlibat dalam studi, "Jumlah bakteri ini merupakan peringatan, seperti jika kita menelan secangkir budaya."

src: “Microbiologically speaking,” she said, “tap water is purer than bottled water — most bottled water.
ref: "Jika bicara secara mikrobiologi" dia mengatakan, "air kran lebih murni daripada air botolan - sebagian besar air botolan.

src: The bacteria are not very harmful to an average person, but many sensitive groups, such as the young, sick or elderly, could get sick from it.
ref: Bakteri tersebut tidak begitu berbahaya bagi rata-rata orang, tapi banyak kelompok yang sensitif, seperti anak-anak, orang sakit atau lansia, bisa sakit disebabkan bakteri tersebut.

src: "Heterotrophic bacteria counts in drinking water are not a health concern to the general public," was the concluding analyses of a recent study by the World Health Organization.
ref: "Bakteri heterotropik di air minum bukan masalah dalam kesehatan masyarakat umum, " ini hasil analisis studi baru-baru ini oleh Organisasi Kesehatan Dunia.

src: The government has announced 13 June as the date for the upcoming Mount Albert by-election.
ref: Pemerintah telah mengumumkan 13 Juni sebagai tanggal untuk pemilihan Mount Albert mendatang.

src: The by-election has been caused by former Prime Minister Helen Clark's departure to head the United Nations Development Program.
ref: Pemilihan umum sela disebabkan ole mantan Perdana Menteri Helen Clark berangkat untuk memimpin Program Pengembangan PBB.

src: While it is considered to be a safe Labour seat, the by-election is expected to be heavily contested.
ref: Ketika dipertimbangkan menjadi kursi aman partai Buruh, pemilu sela diharapkan menjadi perebutan yang ketat.

src: So far four candidates have put their names forward: Auckland city councillor Glenda Fryer, former candidate Hamish McCracken, University of Auckland political studies lecturer Meg Bates and employment lawyer Helen White.
ref: Sampai saat ini 4 kandidat telah menyerahkan nama mereka maju: Anggota dewan kota Auckland, Glenda Fryer, mantan calon Hamish McCracken, dosen studi politik Universitas Auckland Meg Bates dan pengacara hukum Helen White.

src: List MP Phil Twyford, widely expected to succeed Ms Clark, has not put his name forward.
ref: Anggota Dewan Phil Twyford, secara luas diharapkan yang berhasil menggantikan Ibu Clark, tidak mengajukan namanya.

src: The National Party has narrowed its possible candidates down to two: list MP Melissa Lee or unsuccessful 2008 candidate Ravi Musuku.
ref: Partai Nasional menyempitkan calon yang memungkinkan menjadi 2: Anggota Dewan Melissa Lee atau calon yang gagal terpilih tahun 2008 Ravi Musuku.

src: The decision will be made at a party meeting on 4 May.
ref: Keputusan akan dibuat pada pertemuan partai pada tanggal 4 Mei.

src: The Greens and ACT New Zealand will both contest the by-election, but have yet to select candidates.
ref: Greens dan ACT Selandia Baru keduanya akan bertarung dengan pemilu sela, tetapi belum menyeleksi calon-calonnya.

src: Iran's Minister of Justice Gholam-Hossein Elham has requested that Dutch politician Geert Wilders' Qur'an film named Fitna should be prohibited by the Dutch government, Iranian press-agency IRNA reports.
ref: Kantor berita Iran, IRNA, melaporkan bahwa Menteri Kehakiman Iran, Gholam-Hossein Elham, meminta pemerintah Belanda untuk mengeluarkan larangan terhadap film Qur'an berjudul Fitna yang dibuat oleh politisi Belanda Geert Wilders.

src: Elham wrote a letter to his Dutch colleague Ernst Hirsch Ballin stating that: "you can stop the process of this satanic and conspiracy movement based on the European Convention on Human Rights".
ref: Elham mengirim sebuah surat kepada rekannya warga Belanda, Ernst Hirsch Ballin bahwa: "Anda dapat menghentikan gerakan dan konspirasi setan ini berlandaskan Konvensi Eropa tentang Hak Asasi Manusia."

src: Freedom of speech cannot be the reason to allow this film, they say.
ref: Kebebasan berbicara tidak bisa menjadi alasan untuk membolehkan peredaran film ini, kata mereka.

src: "We also respect freedom of speech, but the insult of holy and ethical values is totally unacceptable," Elham writes.
ref: "Kami juga menghormati kebebasan berbicara, tapi penghinaan kepada nilai-nilai suci dan etis merupakan hal yang tidak bisa diterima, " tulis Elham.

src: "The rights of Muslims all over the world are violated by this blaspheming movie."
ref: "Hak-hak kaum muslim di seluruh dunia sudah dilanggar oleh film penyebar fitnah ini."

src: The Qur'an is the holy book for some 1.5 billion Muslims worldwide.
ref: Al Qur-an adalah kitab suci bagi sekitar 1,5 miliar kaum Muslim di seluruh dunia.

src: Wilders announced his "shocking" movie to be ready in March 2008.
ref: Wilders mengumumkan bahwa filmnya "yang menggemparkan" itu akan siap edar pada bulan Maret 2008.

src: At approximately 00:26 hrs, on Wednesday, March 22, the British Columbia ferry MV Queen of the North hit a rock near Gil Island in Wright Sound, off the coast of British Columbia, Canada, 75 from the start of ship's scheduled journey from Prince Rupert to Port Hardy on the Northern tip of Vancouver Island.
ref: Kira-kira jam 00:26, hari Rabu, 22 Maret, kapal feri British Columbia MV Queen of the North menabrak karang dekat Gil Island di Wright Sound, lepas pantai British Columbia, Kanada, 75 dari mulainya perjalanan kapal yang dijadwalkan dari Prince Rupert untuk Port Hardy pada ujung utara Vancouver Island.

src: The ship missed a course change and ran agroung off Gil Island.
ref: Kapal tersebut kehilangan pergantian arah dan mengelilingi Gil Island.

src: It took about an hour for the ferry to sink, giving passengers time to get out.
ref: Memerlukan waktu satu jam pada feri itu untuk tenggelam, memberi penumpang waktu untuk keluar.

src: The vessel was carrying 101 passengers and crew, and all but 2 were accounted for.
ref: Kapal tersebut membawa 101 penumpang dan awak kapal, dan semua tapi 2 yang dicatat.

src: Thanks to quick-response of nearby aboriginal fishing villager of Hartley Bay, and the CCGS Sir Wiflrid Laurier.
ref: Terima kasih untuk reaksi yang cepat dari desa nelayan aborigin terdekat Hartley Bay, dan CCGS Sir Wilfrid Laurier.

src: Survivors were quickly fetched from the Queen of the North's lifeboat and brought to Hartley Bay and onboard the coast Guard ship, and eventually back to Prince Rupert onboard the Sir Wilfrid Laurier.
ref: Yang selamat diambil dengan cepat dari perahu penyelamat Queen of the North dan dibawa ke Hartley Bay dan naik kapal penjaga pantai, dan akhirnya kembali ke Prince Rupert naik kapal Sir Wilfrid Laurier.

src: The Queen of the North, is (apx) 9,000 gross ton, motor driven vessel, built in Germany in 1969.
ref: Queen of the North, adalah (kira-kira) berberat kotor 9.000 ton, kapal berpendorong motor, dibuat di Jerman tahun 1969.

src: The Queen of the North had been on this 15 hrs, 274 nautical mile ferry run since late May 1980.
ref: Queen of the North telah berada di sini 15 jam, 274 mil laut feri dijalankan sejak akhir Mei 1980.

src: In the summer and on relief work, her smaller sister ship, the Queen of Prince Rupert also performs that run.
ref: Pada musim panas dan pekerjaan bantuan, kapal saudara perempuannya yang lebih kecil, Queen of Prince Rupert juga melakukan perjalanan tersebut.

src: President Xanana Gusmão has taken special security powers in a bid to quell the violence raging in East Timor.
ref: Presiden Xanana Gusmao telah mengambil kekuatan keamanan khusus dalam penawaran untuk memadamkan kekerasan hebat yang terjadi di Timor Timur.

src: The period of emergency rule, which would last 30 days, was imposed to "prevent violence and avoid further fatalities" and lead to "rapid reestablishment of public order."
ref: Periode peraturan keamanan tersebut, yang akan berakhir pada 30 hari, dikenakan untuk "mencegah kekerasan dan menghindarkan korban jiwa lebih lanjut."

src: At least 27 people have been killed, criminal documents reported stolen, and looting widespread in the East Timorese capital, Dili during the present period of unrest.
ref: Sedikitnya 27 orang meninggal, dokumen kriminal dilaporkan dicuri, dan penjarahan menyebar di seluruh ibukota Timor Timur, Dili selama periode ini dari kerusuhan.

src: The Australian military commander in East Timor, Brigadier Michael Slater has called the mobs "gutless thugs."
ref: Komandan militer Australia di Timor Timur, Brigadir Michael Slater menamai massa tersebut "preman penakut."

src: Mr Alkatiri was unable to stop the rioting that followed the government's decision in March to lay-off 600 soldiers when they refused to work, complaining of discrimination.
ref: Bapak Alkatiri tidak mampu menghentikan kekacauan yang mengikuti keputusan pemerintah di bulan Maret untuk memberhentikan 600 tentara ketika mereka menolak bekerja, mengeluh tentang diskriminasi.

src: As the disorder grew during April and May, East Timor appealed for international assistance.
ref: Karena kekacauan muncul selama April dan Mei, Timor Timur memohon bantuan internasional.

src: Justice Minister Domingos Sarmento said that Portugal had offered to provide East Timor with 120 security personnel by the weekend.
ref: Menteri Keadilan Domingos Sarmento mengatakan bahwa Portugal berusaha memberikan Timor Timur dengan 120 personil keamanan di akhir minggu ini.

src: The Pentagon has confirmed that US forces began an on-going operation of airstrikes in southern Somalia on Monday, and that the attacks, targeted at Islamic militia, are continuing.
ref: Pentagon telah mengkonfirmasi bahwa pasukan Amerika memulai operasi berkelanjutan dari serangan udara di selatan Somalia pada hari Senin, dan serangan tersebut, mengarah pada milisi Islam, akan diteruskan.

src: Somalia's president had earlier said that the United States was pursuing suspects of the 1998 United States embassy bombings.
ref: Presiden Somalia telah mengatakan dari semula bahwa Amerika mengejar tersangka dari pembom kedutaan besar pada tahun 1998.

src: It is believed that the militants are sheltering the suspects.
ref: Dipercaya bahwa militan telah melindungi tersangka.

src: An attack against Ras Kamboni — a remote island near the Kenyan border, represents the first American involvement in the tumultuous country since the the 1993 operation that resulted in the deaths of as many as 1,500 Somali militiamen and civilians.
ref: Serangan terhadap Ras Kamboni─sebuah pulau terpencil dekat perbatasan Kenya, mewakili keterlibatan pertama Amerika di negara yang rusuh tersebut sejak operasi pada tahun 1993 yang menghasilkan kematian sebanyak 1.500 milisi dan warga sipil Somalia.

src: A Somali Defence Ministry official has additionally reported that American helicopters launched an attack against ICU fighters in Afmadow, a city near the Kenyan border, 350 kilometres southwest of Mogadishu.
ref: Pejabat Kementerian Pertahanan Somalia menambahkan laporan bahwa helikopter Amerika meluncurkan serangan terhadap pejuang ICU di Afmadow, kota di dekat perbatasan Kenya, 350 kilometer barat daya Mogadishu.

src: The AC-130 gunship attack killed an unknown number of civilians, alternatingly reported as 4, 19 or 31.
ref: Serangan pesawat tempur AC-130 menewaskan warga sipil yang tidak diketahui jumlahnya, berselang dilaporkan sebanyak 4, 19 atau 31.

src: In the 2007 Rugby World Cup, New Zealand overwhelmed tournament newcomers Portugal.
ref: Pada tahun 2007 Rugby World Cup, Selandia Baru dibuat kewalahan oleh pendatang baru turnamen Portugal.

src: The All Blacks scored more than 100 points and 16 tries in their 108-13 victory to hold their position at the top of Pool C.
ref: All Blacks mencetak lebih dari 100 poin dan 16 try pada 108-13 kemenangan mereka untuk memegang posisi teratas mereka di Pool C.

src: A dominant first half display from Australia saw them defeat Wales in Cardiff.
ref: Babak pertama dari Australia yang dominan menunjukkan mereka mengalahkan Wales di Cardiff.

src: A strong finish by Wales was not enough to prevent the Wallabies, who lead Pool B, winning 32-20 and picking up a bonus point.
ref: Penyelesaian yang kuat dari Wales tidak cukup untuk mencegah Australia, yang memimpin Pool B, menang 32-20 dan mengambil bonus poin.

src: Ireland came from behind to defeat a strong Georgian team 14-10 in Pool D.
ref: Irlandia datang dari belakang dan mengalahkan tim kuat Georgia 14-10 di Pool D.

src: Georgia led early in the second half and were threatening to score late in the match but Ireland's defence held to secure the four point victory.
ref: Georgia memimpin lebih dulu di babak kedua dan mengancam akan mencetak angka di akhir pertandingan tetapi pertahanan Irlandia mengamankan empat angka kemenangan.

src: New Zealand, one of the tournament favourites, defeated Portugal by 95 points.
ref: Selandia Baru, salah satu favorit turnamen, mengalahkan Portugal dengan 95 angka.

src: Joe Rokocoko scored two tries to open the scoring for New Zealand.
ref: Joe Rokocoko mencetak dua try untuk membuka angka bagi Selandia Baru.

src: Isaia Toeava, Ali Williams, Aaron Mauger, Jerry Collins, Chris Masoe and Andrew Hore each added tries as New Zealand ended the half with a 52-3 lead.
ref: Isaia Toeava, Ali Williams, Aaron Mauger, Jerry Collins, Chris Masoe dan Andrew Hore masing-masing menambahkan try ketika Selandia Baru mengakhiri babak kedua dengan memimpin 52-3.

src: Rui Cordeiro scored Portugal's only try of the match shortly after the restart, which was converted by Duarte Cardoso Pinto.
ref: Rui Cordeiro mencetak angka untuk Portugal hanya try pada pertandingan segera setelah mulai, yang dikonversi oleh Duarte Cardoso Pinto.

src: However tries from Brendon Leonard, Nick Evans, Andrew Ellis, Leon MacDonald, Carl Hayman and two from Conrad Smith completed New Zealand's victory.
ref: Namun try dari Brendon Leonard, Nick Evans, Andrew Ellis, Leon MacDonald, Carl Hayman dan dua dari Conrad Smith melengkapi kemenangan Selandia Baru.

src: Duarte Cardoso Pinto added a penalty for Portugal in the 75th minute.
ref: Duarte Cardoso Pinto menambah penalti untuk Portugal di menit ke 75.

src: Nicky Evans scored 33 points in total for New Zealand, converting 14 tries and scoring one of his own.
ref: Nicky Evans mencetak 33 angka semuanya untuk Selandia Baru, mengkonversi 14 try dan mencetak nilai untuk dirinya sendiri.

src: New Zealand are top of Pool C with ten points, ahead of Scotland with 5 and Italy with 4.
ref: Selandia Baru ada di peringkat atas Pool C dengan sepuluh angka, berada di depan Skotlandia dengan 5 dan Italia dengan 4.

src: Australia took the lead immediately after a second minute penalty from Stirling Mortlock, but Wales equalised five minutes later through Stephen Jones.
ref: Australia memimpin dengan cepat setelah sebuah penalti di menit kedua dari Stirling Mortlock, tetapi Wales akhirnya menyamakan kedudukan melalui Stephen Jones.

src: Australia dominated the first half, and led 25-3 at half time after tries from Matt Giteau, Stirling Mortlock and Chris Latham and a drop goal from Berrick Barnes.
ref: Australia mendominasi babak pertama, dan memimpin 25-3 pada setengah permainan setelah try dari Matt Giteau, Stirling Mortlock dan Chris Latham dan menciptakan gol dari Berrick Barnes.

src: Jonathan Thomas scored a try and James Hook added the conversion and a penalty to cut the deficit to twelve points.
ref: Jonathan Thomas mencetak try dan James Hook menambahkan konversi dan sebuah penalti untuk memotong defisit menjadi dua belas poin.

src: However Chris Latham scored his second try of the match, and Australia's fourth, to restore their hold of the game and secure a bonus point.
ref: Namun Chris Latham mencetak try keduanya pada pertandingan tersebut, dan keempat Australia, untuk mengembalikan posisinya di pertandingan dan mengamankan nilai bonus.

src: Shane Williams scored a try for Wales in the 76th minute after a strong finish, but it came too late and Australia won by twelve points.
ref: Shane Williams mencetak sebuah try untuk Wales pada menit ke 76 setelah penyelesaian yang kuat, tetapi itu datang terlambat dan Australia menang dengan dua belas poin.

src: Wales are second with five points, ahead of Fiji on points difference, while Japan have one point and Canada are bottom of the group with no points.
ref: Wales ada di tempat kedua dengan lima poin, di depan Fiji pada perbedaan poin, sementara Jepang memiliki satu poin dan Kanada berada paling bawah dengan tanpa poin.

src: Rory Best scored the only try of the first half in the 17th minute, which Ronan O'Gara converted.
ref: Skor terbaik Rory adalah hanya try pada babak pertama di menit ke 17, dengan dikonversi oleh Ronan O'Gara.

src: Merab Kvirikashvili scored a penalty late in the first half for Georgia, taking the score to just 7-3 at half time.
ref: Merab Kvirikashvili mencetak penalti pada akhir babak pertama untuk Georgia, membuat skor hanya 7-3 pada setengah permainan.

src: Georgia took a shock lead early in the second half, when Georgi Shkinin scored a try in the 45th minute.
ref: Georgia dengan sangat mengejutkan memimpin lebih awal pada babak kedua, ketika Georgi Shkinin mencetak try di menit 45.

src: Girvan Dempsey regained the lead for Ireland and another Ronan O'Gara conversion made the score 14-10.
ref: Girvan Dempsey mendapatkan kembali kepemimpinan untuk Irlandia dan konversi Roman O'Gara yang lain membuat skor 14-10.

src: Georgia kept up the pressure on Ireland in the late stages of the game, twice reaching Ireland's try line, but they could not get through and Ireland managed to scrape through with a four point lead.
ref: Georgia tetap menekan Irlandia pada akhir babak permainan, dua kali meraih garis try Irlandia, tetapi mereka tidak bisa melalui dan Irlandia berhasil mengumpulkan memimpin dengan empat poin.

src: Ireland are second in Pool D with eight points, behind Argentina on nine.
ref: Irlandia berada di tempat kedua Pool D dengan delapan poin, di belakang Argentina dengan sembilan.

src: France are third with one point from their single match, while Georgia have one point from two defeats.
ref: Perancis berada di tempat ketiga dengan satu poin dari pertandingan pertama mereka, sementara Georgia mendapat satu poin dari dua kekalahan.

src: A circus elephant managed to escape from her handler on Sunday night in the city of Zurich, Switzerland before being recaptured by local police and circus animal keepers.
ref: Gajah sirkus berhasil kabur dari pawangnya pada hari minggu malam di kota Zurich, Swiss sebelum di tangkap kembali oleh polisi lokal dan penjaga sirkus binatang.

src: The 26-year-old female elephant, named Sabu, is from Switzerland's Zirkus Knie.
ref: Gajah betina yang berumur 26 tahun ini bernama Sabu berasal dari Switzerland's Zirkus Knie.

src: She was able to make her escape just before being put into a trailer, while the keeper was not paying attention.
ref: Dia berhasil melarikan diri tepat sebelum dimasukkan ke dalam karavan saat penjaga tidak memperhatikan.

src: Around 1930 local time (1730 UTC), Sabu was seen wading in Lake Zurich for a short time before walking back onto city streets.
ref: Sekitar pukul 19.30 waktu lokal (17.30 UTC), sabu terlihat berendam di danau Zurich sebentar sebelum berjalan kembali kedalam jalan kota.

src: Zurich police said that Sabu wandered along the Bahnhofstrasse avenue of Zurich, which is known as the city's most exclusive shopping street.
ref: Polisi Zurich mengatakan bahwa Sabu berkeliaran di sekitar Bahnhofstrasse avenue di Zurich yang terkenal sebagai pusat perbelanjaan eksklusif di kota.

src: She also passed by Zürich Hauptbahnhof (the city's main rail station) and Paradeplatz, a square of Bahnhofstrasse, where both Credit Suisse Group AG and UBS AG have headquarters.
ref: Dia juga melewati Zurich Hauptbahnhof (jalur utama kereta kota) dan Paradeplatz lapangan dari Bahnhofstrasse yang kedua nya memiliki kantor pusat Credit Suisse Group AG dan UBS AG.

src: For nearly an hour, police chased the elephant around the city before she was finally peacefully recaptured in the Talstrasse section of Zurich.
ref: Hampir satu jam polisi mengejar gajah mengelilingi kota sebelum dia akhirnya dia ditangkap dengan tenang di bagian Talstresse di Zurich.

src: Circus officials and police followed Sabu, but a circus spokesperson said that she did not respond to their calls.
ref: Pemimpin sirkus dan polisi mengikuti Sabu namun pembicara sirkus mengatakan dia tidak merespon panggilan mereka.

src: Sabu was also said to have been moving so fast that police had difficulty keeping up with her.
ref: Sabu juga di kabarkan bergerak dengan cepat sehingga polisi menghadapi kesulitan mengikutinya.

src: At about 2000 local time (1900 UTC), a keeper was able to control the animal and load her onto a truck to take her to Winterthur, where the other circus animals were.
ref: Sekitar pukul 20.00 malam (19.00 UTC) penjaga berhasil mengontrol binatang tersebut dan memasukan nya ke dalam truk untuk membawanya ke Winterthur tempat di mana binatang sirkus lainnya.

src: There were no reports of any damage or injuries during the incident, and although police held back onlookers, at least one bystander managed to capture video of the event.
ref: Tidak ada laporan kerusakan apapun atau cedera selama insiden dan meskipun polisi menahan penonton, setidaknya satu penonton berhasil merekam dengan video dari acara tersebut.

src: The circus said that Sabu may have escaped after being frightened by storms near Zurich.
ref: Sirkus mengatakan bahwa Sabu berhasil kabur setelah ketakutan karena badai di dekat Zurich.

src: After returning to the circus, she was said to be tired, but "pleased to be back."
ref: Setelah kembali ke sirkus, dia dikabarkan lelah namun "senang telah kembali."

src: Welsh poet Dannie Abse (81) and his wife Joan (78) were involved in a car crash while driving from Golders Green to their holiday home in Ogmore-by-Sea, South Wales.
ref: Welsh Poet Dannie Abse (81) dan istrinya Joan (78) terlibat dalam kecelakaan mobil saat mengemudi dari Golders Green ke rumah berlibur mereka di Ogmore di laut south Wales.

src: Mrs. Abse died instantly; Mr Abse suffered a broken rib.
ref: Nyonya Abse meninggal seketika; tuan Abse menderita patah tulang rusuk.

src: The couple was returning from a poetry reading that they both had given.
ref: Pasangan tersebut kembali dari pembacaan puisi yang diberikan keduanya.

src: Dannie Abse is an esteemed Jewish writer who lives in Glamorgan, South Wales.
ref: Dannie abse seorang penulis Yahudi terkemuka yang tinggal di Glamorgan, South Wales.

src: Joan Abse, his wife, was an art historian and writer.
ref: Joan Abse istrinya adalah seorang sejarawan seni dan penulis.

src: Dannie Abse is well-known for being a poet and a medical doctor.
ref: Dannie Abse terkenal sebagai penyair dan dokter medis.

src: Abse, in fact, was a specialist at a chest clinic for over thirty years.
ref: Abse sesungguhnya seorang spesialis di klinik jantung selama lebih dari tiga puluh tahun.

src: But Abse is best known for his writings and has received numerous literary awards and fellowships.
ref: Namun Abse terkenal atas tulisan nya dan telah menerima banyak penghargaan sastra dan beasiswa.

src: In 1989, he received an honorary doctorate from the Universities of Wales.
ref: Pada tahun 1989, ia menerima gelar doktor kehormatan dari Universitas Wales.

src: The couple worked together editing two books in the 1980s.
ref: Pasangan tersebut bekerja bersama mengedit dua buku di tahun 1980an.

src: Joan Abse leaves behind her husband, a son, and two daughters.
ref: Joan Abse meninggalkan suaminya, sorang anak laki-laki dan dua anak perempuan.

src: Four male members of the paparazzi were arrested and charged on Wednesday with reckless driving in Mission Hills, California after following Britney Spears back to her mansion.
ref: 4 orang anggota paparazzi telah ditahan dan didakwa pada hari Rabu karena telah mengemudi dengan ceroboh di Mission Hills, Kalifornia setelah membuntuti Britney Spears kembali ke kediamannya.

src: At least four others were also stopped by police, but were not arrested.
ref: Sedikitnya 4 orang lainnya juga telah dihentikan oleh polisi, tetapi tidak ditangkap.

src: According to reports, police witnessed the entire incident saying that a fleet of paparazzi were following Spears at a high rate of speed around 11:20 p.m. PST (UTC-8).
ref: Menurut laporan, polisi menyaksikan seluruh kejadian dan mengatakan bahwa sebuah armada paparazzi sedang membuntuti Spears dengan kecepatan tinggi pada sekitar pukul 11.20 malam Waktu Pasifik (UTC-8).

src: They also say they followed her too closely and made unsafe lane changes in order to follow her.
ref: Mereka juga mengatakan bahwa mereka membuntutinya terlalu dekat dan berganti jalur dengan tidak aman agar bisa mengikutinya.

src: Police also say that at least one of cars following Spears, who was driving her car, tried to run her off the road, but she was not able to identify the vehicle or the occupants.
ref: Polisi juga berkata bahwa sedikitnya 1 dari mobil-mobil yang membuntuti Spears, yang mengemudi mobilnya, berusaha untuk menyingkirkannya dari jalur, tetapi dia tidak bisa mengidentifikasi kendaraan itu atau penumpangnya.

src: They are reported to have verified her identity, and released her.
ref: Mereka dilaporkan telah memeriksa identitasnya, dan melepaskannya.

src: TMZ.com reports that police were checking to see if her license was valid, and was surprised that it was.
ref: TMZ. com melaporkan bahwa polisi memeriksa keaslian SIMnya, dan terkejut ternyata SIMnya asli.

src: Spears was not charged with anything and despite the paparazzis' recklessness, Spears did not want the men arrested.
ref: Spears tidak didenda apapun dan terlepas dari kecerobohan paparazzi, Spears tidak ingin mereka ditangkap.

src: "Britney Spears was part of the group, but was not driving recklessly," said spokeswoman for the Los Angeles Police Department, Sara Faden.
ref: "Britney Spears adalah bagian dari kelompok tersebut, tetapi tidak mengemudi dengan ceroboh, " kata juru bicara wanita untuk Kepolisian Los Angeles, Sara Faden.
